title: Hyperloop Transformers
authors: Abbas Zeitoun, Lucas Torroba-Hennigen, Yoon Kim
abstract: LLM architecture research generally aims to maximize model quality subject to fixed compute/latency budgets. However, many applications of interest such as edge and on-device deployment are further constrained by the model's memory footprint, thus motivating parameter-efficient architectures for language modeling. This paper describes a simple architecture that improves the parameter-efficiency of LLMs. Our architecture makes use of looped Transformers as a core primitive, which reuse Transformer layers across depth and are thus more parameter-efficient than ordinary (depth-matched) Transformers. We organize the looped Transformer into three blocks--begin, middle, and end blocks--where each block itself consists of multiple Transformer layers, and only the middle block is applied recurrently across depth. We augment the looped middle block with hyper-connections (Xie et al., 2026), which expand the residual stream into matrix-valued residual streams. Hyper-connections are applied only after each loop, and therefore add minimal new parameters and compute cost. Across various model scales, we find that our Hyper-Connected Looped Transformer (Hyperloop Transformer) is able to outperform depth-matched Transformer and mHC Transformer baselines despite using approximately 50% fewer parameters. The outperformance persists through post-training weight quantization, thus positioning Hyperloop Transformers as an attractive architecture for memory-efficient language modeling.
title_zh: 超回路变形金刚
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）架构研究通常旨在在固定的计算量或延迟预算下最大化模型质量。然而，许多实际应用场景（如边缘设备和本地部署）还受到模型内存占用的进一步限制，这促使人们探索参数高效的语言建模范式。本文提出了一种简单而有效的架构，显著提升了LLM的参数效率。该架构以“循环Transformer”为核心单元，通过在深度方向上复用Transformer层，从而比传统的（深度匹配的）Transformer更具参数效率。我们将其组织为三个模块——起始块、中间块和结束块，其中每个模块包含多个Transformer层，仅中间块在深度方向上进行递归应用。此外，我们在循环的中间块中引入了超连接（hyper-connections，Xie等，2026），将残差流扩展为矩阵值的残差流。这些超连接仅在每次循环后应用，因此新增的参数和计算开销极小。在多种模型规模下，我们的超连接循环Transformer（Hyperloop Transformer）在仅使用约50%参数的情况下，仍能超越深度匹配的Transformer和mHC Transformer基线模型。这种性能优势在经过训练后权重量化后依然保持，表明Hyperloop Transformer是一种极具前景的内存高效语言建模范式。

title: OptiVerse: A Comprehensive Benchmark towards Optimization Problem Solving
authors: Xinyu Zhang, Boxuan Zhang, Yuchen Wan, Lingling Zhang, YiXing Yao, Bifan Wei, Yaqiang Wu, Jun Liu
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable reasoning, complex optimization tasks remain challenging, requiring domain knowledge and robust implementation. However, existing benchmarks focus narrowly on Mathematical Programming and Combinatorial Optimization, hindering comprehensive evaluation. To address this, we introduce OptiVerse, a comprehensive benchmark of 1,000 curated problems spanning neglected domains, including Stochastic Optimization, Dynamic Optimization, Game Optimization, and Optimal Control, across three difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, and Hard. The experiments with 22 LLMs of different sizes reveal sharp performance degradation on hard problems, where even advanced models like GPT-5.2 and Gemini-3 struggle to exceed 27% accuracy. Through error analysis, we identify that modeling & logic errors remain the primary bottleneck. Consequently, we propose a Dual-View Auditor Agent that improves the accuracy of the LLM modeling process without introducing significant time overhead. OptiVerse will serve as a foundational platform for advancing LLMs in solving complex optimization challenges.
title_zh: OptiVerse：面向优化问题求解的综合性基准
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理能力方面表现出色，但复杂优化任务仍具挑战性，需要丰富的领域知识和稳健的实现。然而，现有的评估基准主要聚焦于数学规划和组合优化，难以进行全面评估。为解决这一问题，我们提出了 OptiVerse——一个涵盖1000个精心筛选问题的综合性基准，覆盖了以往被忽视的多个领域，包括随机优化、动态优化、博弈优化以及最优控制，并分为简单、中等和困难三个难度等级。对22种不同规模的LLM进行实验后发现，面对难题时性能急剧下降，即使最先进的模型如GPT-5.2和Gemini-3也难以突破27%的准确率。通过错误分析，我们识别出建模与逻辑错误仍是主要瓶颈。为此，我们提出一种双视角审计代理（Dual-View Auditor Agent），可在不显著增加时间开销的前提下，有效提升LLM建模过程的准确性。OptiVerse将作为推动LLMs应对复杂优化挑战的基础平台。

title: An Alternate Agentic AI Architecture (It's About the Data)
authors: Fabian Wenz, Felix Treutwein, Kai Arenja, Çagatay Demiralp, Michael Stonebraker
abstract: For the last several years, the dominant narrative in "agentic AI" has been that large language models should orchestrate information access by dynamically selecting tools, issuing sub-queries, and synthesizing results. We argue this approach is misguided: enterprises do not suffer from a reasoning deficit, but from a data integration problem. Enterprises are data-centric: critical information is scattered across heterogeneous systems (e.g., databases, documents, and external services), each with its own query language, schema, access controls, and performance constraints. In contrast, contemporary LLM-based architectures are optimized for reasoning over unstructured text and treat enterprise systems as either corpora or external tools invoked by a black-box component. This creates a mismatch between schema-rich, governed, performance-critical data systems and text-centric, probabilistic LLM architectures, leading to limited transparency, weak correctness guarantees, and unpredictable performance. In this paper, we present RUBICON, an alternative architecture grounded in data management principles. Instead of delegating orchestration to an opaque agent, we introduce AQL (Agentic Query Language), a small, explicit query algebra - Find, From, and Where - executed through source-specific wrappers that enforce access control, schema alignment, and result normalization. All intermediate results are visible and inspectable. Complex questions are decomposed into structured, auditable query plans rather than hidden chains of LLM calls. Our thesis is simple: enterprise AI is not a prompt engineering problem; it is a systems problem. By reintroducing explicit query structure, wrapper-based mediation, and cost-based optimization, we obtain the breadth of agentic search while preserving traceability, determinism, and trust in enterprise environments.
title_zh: 一种替代的代理式人工智能架构（关键在于数据）
abstract_zh:
在过去的几年中，“自主型AI”领域的主流叙事是：大型语言模型应通过动态选择工具、发出子查询并整合结果，来协调信息获取。我们认为这种思路存在偏差：企业面临的并非推理能力不足的问题，而是数据集成的难题。企业本质上是数据驱动的——关键信息分散在异构系统（如数据库、文档和外部服务）中，每种系统都有其独特的查询语言、数据模式、访问控制机制和性能限制。相比之下，当前基于大语言模型（LLM）的架构主要针对非结构化文本的推理进行优化，将企业系统视为语料库或由黑箱组件调用的外部工具。这种设计导致了模式丰富、受控严格、性能敏感的数据系统与以文本为中心、具有概率性质的LLM架构之间产生严重错配，从而造成透明度不足、正确性保障薄弱以及性能不可预测等问题。

在本文中，我们提出RUBICON——一种基于数据管理原则的替代架构。与将编排权交给不透明代理的做法不同，我们引入了AQL（自主查询语言），这是一种简洁而明确的查询代数，包含三个基本操作：Find（查找）、From（来源）和Where（条件），并通过针对具体数据源的封装器执行，这些封装器负责强制实施访问控制、模式对齐和结果归一化。所有中间结果均可被观察和检查。复杂问题被分解为结构化、可审计的查询计划，而非隐藏在一系列LLM调用链条之中。我们的核心观点十分简单：企业级AI并非提示工程问题，而是一个系统性问题。通过重新引入显式的查询结构、基于封装器的中介机制以及基于成本的优化策略，我们既实现了自主搜索的广泛能力，又保持了可追溯性、确定性和在企业环境中的可信度。

title: Learning to Communicate: Toward End-to-End Optimization of Multi-Agent Language Systems
authors: Ye Yu, Heming Liu, Haibo Jin, Xiaopeng Yuan, Peng Kuang, Haohan Wang
abstract: Multi-agent systems built on large language models have shown strong performance on complex reasoning tasks, yet most work focuses on agent roles and orchestration while treating inter-agent communication as a fixed interface. Latent communication through internal representations such as key-value caches offers a promising alternative to text-based protocols, but existing approaches do not jointly optimize communication with multi-agent reasoning. Therefore we propose DiffMAS, a training framework that treats latent communication as a learnable component of multi-agent systems. DiffMAS performs parameter-efficient supervised training over multi-agent latent trajectories, enabling agents to jointly learn how information should be encoded and interpreted across interactions. Experiments on mathematical reasoning, scientific QA, code generation, and commonsense benchmarks show that DiffMAS consistently improves reasoning accuracy and decoding stability over single-agent inference, text-based multi-agent systems, and prior latent communication methods, achieving 26.7% on AIME24, 20.2% on GPQA-Diamond, and consistent gains across reasoning benchmarks.
title_zh: 学会沟通：迈向多智能体语言系统的端到端优化
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型的多智能体系统在复杂推理任务中表现出强大的性能，然而大多数研究集中于智能体角色和编排机制，而将智能体间的通信视为固定的接口。通过内部表示（如键值缓存）实现的潜在通信为文本协议提供了一种有前景的替代方案，但现有方法并未将通信与多智能体推理联合优化。因此，我们提出了DiffMAS——一种将潜在通信作为多智能体系统可学习组件的训练框架。DiffMAS通过对多智能体潜在轨迹进行参数高效的监督训练，使智能体能够共同学习如何在交互过程中编码和解读信息。在数学推理、科学问答、代码生成及常识性基准测试中的实验表明，与单智能体推理、基于文本的多智能体系统以及先前的潜在通信方法相比，DiffMAS在推理准确率和解码稳定性方面均有显著提升，在AIME24上达到26.7%的准确率，在GPQA-Diamond上达到20.2%，并在各类推理基准测试中均取得稳定增益。

title: AgenticQwen: Training Small Agentic Language Models with Dual Data Flywheels for Industrial-Scale Tool Use
authors: Yuanjie Lyu, Chengyu Wang, Haonan Zheng, Yuanhao Yue, Junbing Yan, Ming Wang, Jun Huang
abstract: Modern industrial applications increasingly demand language models that act as agents, capable of multi-step reasoning and tool use in real-world settings. These tasks are typically performed under strict cost and latency constraints, making small agentic models highly desirable. In this paper, we introduce the AgenticQwen family of models, trained via multi-round reinforcement learning (RL) on synthetic data and a limited amount of open-source data. Our training framework combines reasoning RL and agentic RL with dual data flywheels that automatically generate increasingly challenging tasks. The reasoning flywheel increases task difficulty by learning from errors, while the agentic flywheel expands linear workflows into multi-branch behavior trees that better reflect the decision complexity of real-world applications. We validate AgenticQwen on public benchmarks and in an industrial agent system. The models achieve strong performance on multiple agentic benchmarks, and in our industrial agent system, close the gap with much larger models on search and data analysis tasks. Model checkpoints and part of the synthetic data: https://huggingface.co/collections/alibaba-pai/agenticqwen. Data synthesis and RL training code: https://github.com/haruhi-sudo/data_synth_and_rl. The data synthesis pipeline is also integrated into EasyDistill: https://github.com/modelscope/easydistill.
title_zh: AgenticQwen：基于双数据飞轮训练小型代理型语言模型以实现工业级工具应用
abstract_zh: 现代工业应用日益需要能够作为智能体运行的语言模型，这些模型需具备多步推理能力和在真实场景中使用工具的能力。由于这些任务通常受到严格的成本和延迟限制，因此小型智能体模型显得尤为可取。本文介绍了AgenticQwen系列模型，该系列模型通过在合成数据和少量开源数据上进行多轮强化学习（RL）训练而成。我们的训练框架结合了推理强化学习与智能体强化学习，并采用双数据飞轮机制，自动生成难度逐步提升的任务。其中，推理飞轮通过从错误中学习来提高任务难度；而智能体飞轮则将线性工作流扩展为多分支行为树，更真实地反映现实应用中的决策复杂性。我们在公开基准测试以及工业级智能体系统中对AgenticQwen进行了验证，结果显示其在多个智能体基准测试中表现优异，并在我们的工业智能体系统中，于搜索和数据分析任务上显著缩小了与大型模型之间的性能差距。模型检查点及部分合成数据：https://huggingface.co/collections/alibaba-pai/agenticqwen。数据合成与强化学习训练代码：https://github.com/haruhi-sudo/data_synth_and_rl。数据合成流程也已集成至EasyDistill项目中：https://github.com/modelscope/easydistill。

title: Assessing the Impact of Requirement Ambiguity on LLM-based Function-Level Code Generation
authors: Di Yang, Xinou Xie, Xiuwen Yang, Ming Hu, Yihao Huang, Yueling Zhang, Weikai Miao, Ting Su, Chengcheng Wan, Geguang Pu
abstract: Software requirement ambiguity is ubiquitous in real-world development, stemming from the inherent imprecision of natural language and the varying interpretations of stakeholders. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in generating code from precise specifications, such ambiguity poses a significant obstacle to reliable automated code generation. Existing benchmarks typically assume clear and unambiguous requirements, leaving an empirical gap in understanding how LLMs behave when faced with the inherent uncertainty of real-world software requirements. In this paper, we introduce Orchid, the first code generation benchmark specifically designed with ambiguous requirements. It comprises 1,304 function-level tasks covering four distinct types of ambiguity: lexical, syntactic, semantic, and vagueness. Leveraging this dataset, we conduct the first systematic empirical study to evaluate the impact of requirement ambiguity on LLM-based code generation. Our results demonstrate that ambiguity consistently degrades the performance of all evaluated LLMs, with the most pronounced negative effects observed in highly advanced models. Furthermore, we observe that LLMs frequently produce functionally divergent implementations for the same ambiguous requirement and lack the capability to identify or resolve such ambiguity autonomously. These findings reveal a significant performance gap between clear and ambiguous requirements, underscoring the urgent need for ambiguity-aware techniques in the next generation of automated software engineering tools. The Orchid benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/SII-YDD/Orchid.
title_zh: 评估需求模糊性对基于大语言模型的函数级代码生成的影响
abstract_zh: 软件需求的模糊性在现实世界开发中普遍存在，其根源在于自然语言固有的不精确性以及利益相关者对需求的不同理解。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在根据明确规范生成代码方面表现出色，但这种模糊性却成为实现可靠自动化代码生成的重大障碍。现有的基准测试通常假设需求清晰且无歧义，因而未能充分揭示LLMs在面对真实世界软件需求中固有不确定性时的实际表现，形成了一个实证研究的空白。本文提出Orchid，这是首个专为包含模糊需求而设计的代码生成基准。该基准包含1,304个函数级任务，涵盖四种不同类型的模糊性：词汇性、语法性、语义性和模糊性。基于这一数据集，我们首次开展了系统性的实证研究，评估需求模糊性对基于LLM的代码生成的影响。研究结果表明，模糊性会持续降低所有被评估LLM的性能，其中对最先进的模型影响最为显著。此外，我们发现LLM对于同一模糊需求常常生成功能上存在差异的实现，且缺乏自主识别或解决此类模糊性问题的能力。这些发现揭示了清晰需求与模糊需求之间显著的性能差距，凸显出下一代自动化软件工程工具亟需具备模糊性感知能力。Orchid基准数据集已公开发布于 https://huggingface.co/datasets/SII-YDD/Orchid。

title: Generalizing Test Cases for Comprehensive Test Scenario Coverage
authors: Binhang Qi, Yun Lin, Xinyi Weng, Chenyan Liu, Hailong Sun, Gordon Fraser, Jin Song Dong
abstract: Test cases are essential for software development and maintenance. In practice, developers derive multiple test cases from an implicit pattern based on their understanding of requirements and inference of diverse test scenarios, each validating a specific behavior of the focal method. However, producing comprehensive tests is time-consuming and error-prone: many important tests that should have accompanied the initial test are added only after a significant delay, sometimes only after bugs are triggered. Existing automated test generation techniques largely focus on code coverage. Yet in real projects, practical tests are seldom driven by code coverage alone, since test scenarios do not necessarily align with control-flow branches. Instead, test scenarios originate from requirements, which are often undocumented and implicitly embedded in a project's design and implementation. However, developer-written tests are frequently treated as executable specifications; thus, even a single initial test that reflects the developer's intent can reveal the underlying requirement and the diverse scenarios that should be validated. In this work, we propose TestGeneralizer, a framework for generalizing test cases to comprehensively cover test scenarios. TestGeneralizer orchestrates three stages: (1) enhancing the understanding of the requirement and scenario behind the focal method and initial test; (2) generating a test scenario template and crystallizing it into various test scenario instances; and (3) generating and refining executable test cases from these instances. We evaluate TestGeneralizer against three state-of-the-art baselines on 12 open-source Java projects. TestGeneralizer achieves significant improvements: +31.66% and +23.08% over ChatTester, in mutation-based and LLM-assessed scenario coverage, respectively.
title_zh: 为实现全面的测试场景覆盖而泛化测试用例
abstract_zh: 测试用例对于软件开发与维护至关重要。在实际工作中，开发者基于对需求的理解以及对多样化测试场景的推断，从隐含模式中衍生出多个测试用例，每个用例用于验证目标方法的特定行为。然而，生成全面的测试用例既耗时又容易出错：许多本应在初始测试阶段就包含的重要测试，往往在长时间延迟后才被补充，有时甚至只有在缺陷被触发后才被添加。现有的自动化测试生成技术大多聚焦于代码覆盖率。但在真实项目中，实际测试很少仅由代码覆盖率驱动，因为测试场景并不一定与控制流分支一一对应。相反，测试场景源于需求，而这些需求常常未被明确记录，而是隐含在项目的架构与实现之中。然而，开发者编写的测试通常被视为可执行的规格说明；因此，即使只有一个反映开发者意图的初始测试，也能揭示底层需求以及应被验证的多样化场景。本文提出 TestGeneralizer，一个用于全面覆盖测试场景的测试用例泛化框架。TestGeneralizer 通过三个阶段协同工作：(1) 增强对目标方法及其初始测试背后需求与场景的理解；(2) 生成测试场景模板，并将其具体化为多种测试场景实例；(3) 从这些实例生成并优化可执行的测试用例。我们在12个开源Java项目上，将 TestGeneralizer 与三种最先进的基线方法进行对比评估。结果表明，TestGeneralizer 取得了显著改进：在基于变异的场景覆盖率上比 ChatTester 提高了 +31.66%，在基于大语言模型评估的场景覆盖率上提高了 +23.08%。

title: Thinking with Reasoning Skills: Fewer Tokens, More Accuracy
authors: Guangxiang Zhao, Qilong Shi, Xusen Xiao, Xiangzheng Zhang, Tong Yang, Lin Sun
abstract: Reasoning LLMs often spend substantial tokens on long intermediate reasoning traces (e.g., chain-of-thought) when solving new problems. We propose to summarize and store reusable reasoning skills distilled from extensive deliberation and trial-and-error exploration, and to retrieve these skills at inference time to guide future reasoning. Unlike the prevailing \emph{reasoning from scratch} paradigm, our approach first recalls relevant skills for each query, helping the model avoid redundant detours and focus on effective solution paths. We evaluate our method on coding and mathematical reasoning tasks, and find that it significantly reduces reasoning tokens while improving overall performance. The resulting lower per-request cost indicates strong practical and economic potential for real-world deployment.
title_zh: 运用推理技能进行思考：更少的标记，更高的准确率
abstract_zh: 推理型大模型在解决新问题时，常常需要消耗大量标记（tokens）来生成冗长的中间推理过程（例如思维链）。我们提出一种方法：从大量的深思熟虑与试错探索中提炼并存储可复用的推理技能，并在推理阶段检索这些技能以指导后续的推理过程。与当前主流的“从零开始推理”范式不同，我们的方法首先针对每个查询召回相关的推理技能，帮助模型避免重复绕弯路，从而聚焦于有效的解题路径。我们在编程和数学推理任务上评估了该方法，结果表明，该方法显著减少了推理所需的标记数量，同时提升了整体性能。由此带来的单次请求成本降低，显示出其在实际应用中的强大潜力和经济价值。

title: AEL: Agent Evolving Learning for Open-Ended Environments
authors: Wujiang Xu, Jiaojiao Han, Minghao Guo, Kai Mei, Xi Zhu, Han Zhang, Dimitris N. Metaxas
abstract: LLM agents increasingly operate in open-ended environments spanning hundreds of sequential episodes, yet they remain largely stateless: each task is solved from scratch without converting past experience into better future behavior. The central obstacle is not \emph{what} to remember but \emph{how to use} what has been remembered, including which retrieval policy to apply, how to interpret prior outcomes, and when the current strategy itself must change. We introduce \emph{Agent Evolving Learning} (\ael{}), a two-timescale framework that addresses this obstacle. At the fast timescale, a Thompson Sampling bandit learns which memory retrieval policy to apply at each episode; at the slow timescale, LLM-driven reflection diagnoses failure patterns and injects causal insights into the agent's decision prompt, giving it an interpretive frame for the evidence it retrieves. On a sequential portfolio benchmark (10 sector-diverse tickers, 208 episodes, 5 random seeds), \ael{} achieves a Sharpe ratio of 2.13$\pm$0.47, outperforming five published self-improving methods and all non-LLM baselines while maintaining the lowest variance among all LLM-based approaches. A nine-variant ablation reveals a ``less is more'' pattern: memory and reflection together produce a 58\% cumulative improvement over the stateless baseline, yet every additional mechanism we test (planner evolution, per-tool selection, cold-start initialization, skill extraction, and three credit assignment methods) \emph{degrades} performance. This demonstrates that the bottleneck in agent self-improvement is \emph{self-diagnosing how to use} experience rather than adding architectural complexity. Code and data: https://github.com/WujiangXu/AEL.
title_zh: AEL：面向开放环境的智能体演化学习
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLM）代理正越来越多地在包含数百个连续任务的开放环境中运行，然而它们仍基本处于“无状态”状态：每个任务都从零开始解决，无法将过往经验转化为更优的未来行为。核心障碍不在于“记住什么”，而在于“如何使用”已记住的内容，包括应采用何种记忆检索策略、如何解读以往的结果，以及何时需要改变当前的策略本身。为此，我们提出了**代理演化学习**（Agent Evolving Learning, \ael{}），一种双时间尺度框架，以应对这一挑战。在快速时间尺度上，基于汤普森采样的强化学习机制（Thompson Sampling bandit）学习在每个任务中应采用何种记忆检索策略；在慢速时间尺度上，由大语言模型驱动的反思机制分析失败模式，并将因果洞见注入到代理的决策提示中，为其所检索的信息提供可解释的框架。

在一项序列化投资组合基准测试中（涵盖10个行业分散的股票标的，共208个周期，5个随机种子），\ael{}取得了2.13±0.47的夏普比率，显著优于五种已发表的自提升方法，以及所有非LLM基线模型，同时在所有基于LLM的方法中保持最低的方差。九种变体的消融实验揭示出一种“少即是多”的规律：记忆与反思的结合使累积性能相比无状态基线提升了58%，但我们在测试中引入的每一项额外机制——包括规划器演化、工具选择、冷启动初始化、技能提取，以及三种信用分配方法——均导致性能下降。

这表明，代理自我提升的瓶颈并非架构复杂性的增加，而是**自我诊断如何有效利用经验**的能力。代码与数据详见：https://github.com/WujiangXu/AEL。

title: Can Large Language Models Assist the Comprehension of ROS2 Software Architectures?
authors: Laura Duits, Bouazza El Moutaouakil, Ivano Malavolta
abstract: Context. The most used development framework for robotics software is ROS2. ROS2 architectures are highly complex, with thousands of components communicating in a decentralized fashion. Goal. We aim to evaluate how LLMs can assist in the comprehension of factual information about the architecture of ROS2 systems. Method. We conduct a controlled experiment where we administer 1,230 prompts to 9 LLMs containing architecturally-relevant questions about 3 ROS2 systems with incremental size. We provide a generic algorithm that systematically generates architecturally-relevant questions for a ROS2 system. Then, we (i) assess the accuracy of the answers of the LLMs against a ground truth established via running and monitoring the 3 ROS2 systems and (ii) qualitatively analyse the explanations provided by the LLMs. Results. Almost all questions are answered correctly across all LLMs (mean=98.22%). gemini-2.5-pro performs best (100% accuracy across all prompts and systems), followed by o3 (99.77%), and gemini-2.5-flash (99.72%); the least performing LLM is gpt-4.1 (95%). Only 300/1,230 prompts are incorrectly answered, of which 249 are about the most complex system. The coherence scores in LLM's explanations range from 0.394 for "service references" to 0.762 for "communication path". The mean perplexity varies significantly across models, with chatgpt-4o achieving the lowest score (19.6) and o4-mini the highest (103.6). Conclusions. There is great potential in the usage of LLMs to aid ROS2 developers in comprehending non-trivial aspects of the software architecture of their systems. Nevertheless, developers should be aware of the intrinsic limitations and different performances of the LLMs and take those into account when using them.
title_zh: 大型语言模型能否辅助理解ROS2软件架构？
abstract_zh:
背景。机器人软件开发中最常用的框架是ROS2。ROS2的架构极为复杂，包含成千上万个组件以去中心化的方式进行通信。  
目标。我们旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在帮助理解ROS2系统架构中事实性信息方面的辅助能力。  
方法。我们开展了一项受控实验，向9个LLM共提出了1,230个提示，这些问题均围绕三个规模逐步增加的ROS2系统展开，且与系统架构密切相关。我们提出了一种通用算法，可系统性地为任意ROS2系统生成具有架构相关性的提问。随后，我们（i）将LLM的回答准确性与通过实际运行和监控这三个ROS2系统所建立的基准真值进行对比；（ii）对LLM提供的解释内容进行定性分析。  
结果。几乎所有问题在所有LLM中均被正确回答（平均准确率98.22%）。其中表现最佳的是gemini-2.5-pro（在所有提示和系统上均达到100%准确率），其次是o3（99.77%）和gemini-2.5-flash（99.72%）；表现最差的是gpt-4.1（准确率为95%）。总共仅有300/1,230个提示回答错误，其中249个错误出现在最复杂的系统中。LLM解释内容的连贯性得分介于0.394（“服务引用”）至0.762（“通信路径”）之间。各模型的平均困惑度差异显著，chatgpt-4o最低（19.6），而o4-mini最高（103.6）。  
结论。LLM在辅助ROS2开发者理解其系统非平凡的软件架构方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，开发者应意识到LLM固有的局限性及其性能差异，在使用时需谨慎权衡并加以考量。

title: A-IC3: Learning-Guided Adaptive Inductive Generalization for Hardware Model Checking
authors: Xiaofeng Zhou, Guangyu Hu, Hongce Zhang, Wei Zhang
abstract: The IC3 algorithm represents the state-of-the-art (SOTA) hardware model checking technique, owing to its robust performance and scalability. A significant body of research has focused on enhancing the solving efficiency of the IC3 algorithm, with particular attention to the inductive generalization process: a critical phase wherein the algorithm seeks to generalize a counterexample to inductiveness (CTI), which typically is a state leading to a bad state, into a broader set of states. This inductive generalization is a primary source of clauses in IC3 and thus plays a pivotal role in determining the overall effectiveness of the algorithm. Despite its importance, existing approaches often rely on fixed inductive generalization strategies, overlooking the dynamic and context-sensitive nature of the verification environment in which spurious counterexamples arise. This rigidity can limit the quality of generated clauses and, consequently, the performance of IC3. To address this limitation, we propose a lightweight machine-learning-based framework that dynamically selects appropriate inductive generalization strategies in response to the evolving verification context. Specifically, we employ a multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithm to adaptively choose inductive generalization strategies based on real-time feedback from the verification process. The agent is updated by evaluating the quality of generalization outcomes, thereby refining its strategy selection over time. Empirical evaluation on a benchmark suite comprising 914 instances, primarily drawn from the latest HWMCC collection, demonstrates the efficacy of our approach. When implemented on the state-of-the-art model checker rIC3, our method solves 26 to 50 more cases than the baselines and improves the PAR-2 score by 194.72 to 389.29.
title_zh: A-IC3：面向硬件模型检测的学习引导自适应归纳概括方法
abstract_zh:
IC3算法代表了当前最先进的硬件模型检测技术，凭借其出色的性能和可扩展性而备受关注。大量研究致力于提升IC3算法的求解效率，尤其聚焦于归纳泛化（inductive generalization）这一关键环节：在该阶段，算法试图将一个反例（CTI，即导致错误状态的状态）泛化为更广泛的状态集合。这一归纳泛化过程是IC3中产生约束子句的主要来源，因此对算法整体有效性起着决定性作用。然而，现有方法通常采用固定的归纳泛化策略，忽视了在出现虚假反例时验证环境所具有的动态性和上下文敏感性。这种僵化策略可能限制生成子句的质量，进而影响IC3的性能表现。

为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种轻量级的基于机器学习的框架，能够根据不断变化的验证上下文动态选择合适的归纳泛化策略。具体而言，我们采用多臂赌博机（Multi-Armed Bandit, MAB）算法，依据验证过程中的实时反馈自适应地选择归纳泛化策略。通过评估泛化结果的质量来更新智能体，从而实现策略选择的持续优化。

在包含914个实例的基准测试集上进行的实证评估表明，本方法具有显著成效。该方法在最先进的模型检查器rIC3上的实现，相比基线方法，能够多解决26至50个实例，并将PAR-2得分提升194.72至389.29。

title: A Sociotechnical, Practitioner-Centered Approach to Technology Adoption in Cybersecurity Operations: An LLM Case
authors: Francis Hahn, Mohd Mamoon, Alexandru G. Bardas, Michael Collins, Daniel Lende, Xinming Ou, S. Raj Rajagopalan
abstract: Technology for security operations centers (SOCs) has a storied history of slow adoption due to concerns about trust and reliability. These concerns are amplified with artificial intelligence, particularly large language models (LLMs), which exhibit issues such as hallucinations and inconsistent outputs. To assess whether LLM-based tools can improve SOC efficiency, we embedded two PhD researchers within a multinational company SOC for six months of ethnographic fieldwork. We identified recurring challenges, such as repetitive tasks, fragmented/unclear data, and tooling bottlenecks, and collaborated directly with practitioners to develop LLM companion tools aligned with their operational needs. Iterative refinement reduced workflow disruption and improved interpretability, leading from skepticism to sustained adoption. Ethnographic analysis indicates that this shift was enabled by our sociotechnical co-creation process consistent with Nonaka's SECI model. This framework explains the common challenges in traditional SOC technology adoption, including workflow misalignment, rigidity against evolving threats and internal requirements, and stagnation over time. Our findings show that the co-creation approach can overcome these old barriers and create a new paradigm for creating usable technology for cybersecurity operations.
title_zh: 一种社会技术性、以实践者为中心的网络安全运营中技术采纳方法：以大语言模型为例
abstract_zh: 安全运营中心（SOC）的技术发展史一直伴随着缓慢的采纳速度，这主要源于对信任与可靠性的担忧。这些担忧在人工智能领域，尤其是大型语言模型（LLMs）中被进一步放大，因为它们存在幻觉现象和输出不一致等问题。为了评估基于大语言模型的工具是否能够提升SOC的工作效率，我们派遣两名博士研究员深入一家跨国公司的SOC，开展了为期六个月的民族志实地研究。在此过程中，我们识别出一系列反复出现的挑战，包括重复性任务、数据碎片化或不清晰，以及工具链瓶颈等，并与一线操作人员直接协作，开发出符合其实际需求的LLM辅助工具。通过持续迭代优化，工作流程的中断显著减少，结果的可解释性得到提升，从而将最初的高度怀疑逐步转变为长期稳定的应用。民族志分析表明，这一转变得益于我们所采用的社会技术协同共创过程，该过程与野中郁次郎（Nonaka）提出的SECI模型高度一致。该框架揭示了传统SOC技术采纳中常见的障碍，如工作流程不匹配、对不断演变的威胁和内部需求缺乏灵活性，以及随时间推移而产生的停滞状态。我们的研究发现，这种协同共创方法能够有效突破上述旧有壁垒，为网络安全运营领域创造可用技术开辟了一种全新的范式。

title: Process Supervision via Verbal Critique Improves Reasoning in Large Language Models
authors: Hao-Yuan Chen
abstract: Inference-time scaling for LLM reasoning has focused on three axes: chain depth, sample breadth, and learned step-scorers (PRMs). We introduce a fourth axis, granularity of external verbal supervision, via Verbal Process Supervision (VPS), a training-free framework that uses structured natural-language critique from a stronger supervisor to guide an iterative generate-critique-refine loop up to a round budget R. Across GPQA Diamond, AIME 2025, and LiveCodeBench V6 (covering both closed and open models), VPS yields three key results. First, on GPQA Diamond, GPT-5.4 (High) | GPT-5.4 (Low) reaches 94.9% at R=4, surpassing the 94.1% state of the art without gradient updates. Second, on AIME 2025, VPS enables strong weak-actor rescue, boosting scores from 11.7-26.7% to 63.3-90.0% (up to +63.3 points). Third, at matched compute, VPS outperforms Reflexion by +8.5 to +12.1 points and Self-Consistency@5 by +5.0 pp (GPQA) and +8.3 pp (LiveCodeBench), isolating critique granularity as the key driver. Performance scales with the supervisor-actor capability gap (Pearson r=0.90) and degrades when errors are not linguistically expressible (e.g., code synthesis), motivating hybrid verbal-executable methods. These results establish critique granularity as a new axis of inference-time scaling.
title_zh: 通过口头批评进行过程监督可提升大型语言模型的推理能力
abstract_zh:
在大语言模型推理的推理时扩展方面，现有研究主要聚焦于三个维度：链式深度、样本广度以及学习到的步骤评分器（PRMs）。我们引入了第四个维度——外部语言监督的粒度，并提出了无需训练的框架“语言过程监督”（Verbal Process Supervision, VPS），该框架利用更强的监督者提供的结构化自然语言批评，指导一个迭代式的“生成-批评-修正”循环，直至达到预设的轮次预算R。在GPQA Diamond、AIME 2025以及LiveCodeBench V6（涵盖封闭与开放模型）等多个基准上，VPS取得了三项关键成果。

第一，在GPQA Diamond任务中，GPT-5.4（High）| GPT-5.4（Low）在R=4时达到94.9%的准确率，超越了此前无需梯度更新的94.1%最佳水平。

第二，在AIME 2025任务中，VPS实现了对弱模型的有效挽救，将原本11.7%-26.7%的得分大幅提升至63.3%-90.0%（最高提升达+63.3分）。

第三，在相同计算开销下，VPS的表现优于Reflexion（提升+8.5至+12.1分），也优于Self-Consistency@5（在GPQA上提升+5.0个百分点，在LiveCodeBench上提升+8.3个百分点），从而明确揭示出“批评粒度”是推动性能提升的关键因素。

此外，性能随监督者与执行者能力差距的增大而提升（皮尔逊相关系数r=0.90），而当错误无法通过语言表达（如代码生成）时，性能则会下降，这进一步推动了结合语言与可执行反馈的混合方法的发展。

这些结果确立了“批评粒度”作为推理时扩展的新维度。

title: DryRUN: On the Role of Public Tests in LLM-Driven Code Generation
authors: Kaushitha Silva, Srinath Perera
abstract: Multi-agent frameworks are widely used in autonomous code generation and have applications in complex algorithmic problem-solving. Recent work has addressed the challenge of generating functionally correct code by incorporating simulation-driven planning and debugging, where language models trace execution steps to verify logic. However, these approaches depend on human-provided public test cases to ground the debugging and simulation loop. Manually authoring comprehensive input-output examples is a labor-intensive bottleneck in the software development lifecycle. Because ground-truth input-output examples are rarely available prior to implementation in real-world software engineering, this dependency restricts methods to curated competitive programming benchmarks. Furthermore, we identify that reliance on these public tests induces an ``overconfidence gap,'' causing frameworks to overfit to simplistic examples and fail on hidden evaluations. In contrast, we observe that external sample inputs are not strictly necessary for code generation. We demonstrate that large language models can autonomously generate valid inputs and simulate execution traces to self-correct. Consequently, we develop DryRUN, a framework that eliminates the need for ground-truth samples by allowing the LLM to iteratively plan, autonomously generate its own inputs and simulate execution, mitigating algorithmic overconfidence. Evaluations on the LiveCodeBench v6 dataset (post-March 2025) demonstrate that DryRUN matches performance against CodeSIM, a state-of-the-art and public-test-dependent framework, while operating entirely without public test cases or external execution feedback while reducing output token consumption.
title_zh: DryRUN：公开测试在LLM驱动的代码生成中的作用
abstract_zh: 多智能体框架在自主代码生成中被广泛应用，并已拓展至复杂算法问题求解领域。近期研究通过引入基于模拟的规划与调试机制，尝试解决生成功能正确代码的挑战，其中语言模型会追踪执行步骤以验证逻辑正确性。然而，这些方法依赖于人工提供的公开测试用例来支撑调试与模拟循环。手动编写全面的输入-输出示例是软件开发生命周期中的一个耗时瓶颈。由于在真实世界软件工程中，实现之前通常无法获得真实的输入-输出示例，这种依赖性使得现有方法仅适用于经过精心筛选的编程竞赛基准数据集。此外，我们发现对公共测试用例的过度依赖会引发“过度自信鸿沟”——导致框架过拟合于简单示例，在面对隐藏评估时表现失败。相比之下，我们观察到外部样本输入并非代码生成所必需。我们证明了大型语言模型能够自主生成有效输入并模拟执行轨迹，从而实现自我修正。因此，我们提出了 DryRUN 框架，该框架无需依赖真实样本，允许语言模型迭代式地进行规划、自主生成输入并模拟执行过程，有效缓解了算法层面的过度自信问题。在 LiveCodeBench v6 数据集（2025 年 3 月后版本）上的评估表明，DryRUN 在性能上可媲美 CodeSIM——这一当前最先进的、依赖公开测试用例的框架——同时完全不使用公开测试用例或外部执行反馈，且显著降低了输出 token 的消耗。

title: A Metamorphic Testing Approach to Diagnosing Memorization in LLM-Based Program Repair
authors: Milan De Koning, Ali Asgari, Pouria Derakhshanfar, Annibale Panichella
abstract: LLM-based automated program repair (APR) techniques have shown promising results in reducing debugging costs. However, prior results can be affected by data leakage: large language models (LLMs) may memorize bug fixes when evaluation benchmarks overlap with their pretraining data, leading to inflated performance estimates. In this paper, we investigate whether we can better reveal data leakage by combining metamorphic testing (MT) with negative log-likelihood (NLL), which has been used in prior work as a proxy for memorization. We construct variant benchmarks by applying semantics-preserving transformations to two widely used datasets, Defects4J and GitBug-Java. Using these benchmarks, we evaluate the repair success rates of seven LLMs on both original and transformed versions, and analyze the relationship between performance degradation and NLL. Our results show that all evaluated state-of-the-art LLMs exhibit substantial drops in patch generation success rates on transformed benchmarks, ranging from -4.1% for GPT-4o to -15.98% for Llama-3.1. Furthermore, we find that this degradation strongly correlates with NLL on the original benchmarks, suggesting that models perform better on instances they are more likely to have memorized. These findings show that combining MT with NLL provides stronger and more reliable evidence of data leakage, while metamorphic testing alone can help mitigate its effects in LLM-based APR evaluations.
title_zh: 一种基于变异测试的诊断大语言模型程序修复中记忆现象的方法
abstract_zh:
基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动化程序修复（APR）技术在降低调试成本方面展现出令人瞩目的成果。然而，以往的研究结果可能受到数据泄露的影响：当评估基准与大语言模型的预训练数据存在重叠时，模型可能会“记忆”已有的缺陷修复方案，从而导致性能评估结果被高估。本文通过将变异测试（Metamorphic Testing, MT）与负对数似然（Negative Log-Likelihood, NLL）相结合，探索是否能更有效地揭示数据泄露问题。NLL在先前研究中已被用作模型记忆行为的代理指标。

我们通过对两个广泛使用的数据集——Defects4J 和 GitBug-Java——施加语义保持的变换，构建了变体基准。利用这些新基准，我们评估了七种主流大语言模型在原始版本和变换版本上的修复成功率，并分析了性能下降程度与原始基准上NLL值之间的关系。实验结果表明，所有被评估的先进大语言模型在变体基准上的补丁生成成功率均出现显著下降，降幅从 GPT-4o 的 -4.1% 到 Llama-3.1 的 -15.98% 不等。此外，我们发现这种性能下降程度与模型在原始基准上的NLL值存在强烈相关性，说明模型在那些更可能已被其“记忆”的实例上表现更好。

上述发现表明，将MT与NLL结合能够提供比单独使用任一方法更强且更可靠的证据，以揭示数据泄露现象；同时，仅使用MT本身也可在LLM-based APR评估中有效缓解数据泄露带来的影响。

title: Hidden Dependencies and Component Variants in SBOM-Based Software Composition Analysis
authors: Shawn Rasheed, Max McPhee, Lisa Patterson, Stephen MacDonell, Jens Dietrich
abstract: Software Bills of Material (SBOMs) have emerged as an important technology for vulnerability management amid rising supply-chain attacks. They represent component relationships within a software product and support software composition analysis (SCA) by linking components to known vulnerabilities. However, the effectiveness of SBOM-based analysis depends on how accurately SBOMs represent component identities and actual dependencies in software. This paper studies two mismatch patterns: hidden code-level dependencies that are not represented as component-level dependencies, and component variants (clones) that cannot be identified consistently by scanners. We show that these mismatches can lead to inconsistent vulnerability reporting and inconsistent handling of VEX statements across popular SBOM-based vulnerability scanners. These results highlight limitations in current SBOM production and consumption and motivate richer dependency representation and component identity.
title_zh: SBOM-based软件组成分析中的隐藏依赖项与组件变体
abstract_zh: 软件物料清单（SBOM）在日益增多的供应链攻击背景下，已成为漏洞管理中的关键技术。SBOM能够反映软件产品内部组件之间的关系，并通过将组件与已知漏洞关联，支持软件组成分析（SCA）。然而，基于SBOM的分析效果取决于SBOM对组件身份及实际依赖关系的准确表示程度。本文研究了两种不匹配模式：未以组件级依赖形式体现的隐藏代码级依赖，以及无法被扫描工具一致识别的组件变体（克隆）。研究发现，这些不匹配可能导致漏洞报告不一致，以及在主流基于SBOM的漏洞扫描工具中对VEX声明的处理不一致。这些结果揭示了当前SBOM生成与使用环节的局限性，也推动了更丰富依赖关系表达和更精确组件身份识别的需求。

title: Tool Attention Is All You Need: Dynamic Tool Gating and Lazy Schema Loading for Eliminating the MCP/Tools Tax in Scalable Agentic Workflows
authors: Anuj Sadani, Deepak Kumar
abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a common interface for connecting large language model (LLM) agents to external tools, but its reliance on stateless, eager schema injection imposes a hidden per-turn overhead the MCP Tax or Tools Tax that practitioner reports place between roughly 10k and 60k tokens in typical multi-server deployments. This payload inflates the key-value cache, is associated with reasoning degradation as context utilization approaches published fracture points around 70%, and turns token budgets into a recurring operational cost. We introduce Tool Attention, a middleware-layer mechanism that generalizes the "Attention Is All You Need" paradigm from self-attention over tokens to gated attention over tools. Tool Attention combines (i) an Intent Schema Overlap (ISO) score from sentence embeddings, (ii) a state-aware gating function enforcing preconditions and access scopes, and (iii) a two-phase lazy schema loader that keeps a compact summary pool in context and promotes full JSON schemas only for top-k gated tools. We evaluate on a simulated 120-tool, six-server benchmark whose per-server token counts are calibrated to public audits of real MCP deployments. In this simulation, Tool Attention directly reduces measured per-turn tool tokens by 95.0% (47.3k -> 2.4k) and raises effective context utilization (a token-ratio quantity) from 24% to 91%. End-to-end figures for task success, latency, cost, and reasoning quality are reported as projections derived from the measured token counts combined with published deployment telemetry; they are not measured on live LLM agents, and we mark projected values explicitly throughout. Taken together, the results support a simple thesis: protocol-level efficiency, not raw context length, is a binding constraint on scalable gentic systems. The code for this work is accessible at https://github.com/asadani/tool-attention
title_zh: 工具：Attention Is All You Need：用于消除可扩展代理工作流中MCP/工具税的动态工具门控与懒加载模式
abstract_zh:
模型上下文协议（MCP）已成为连接大型语言模型（LLM）代理与外部工具的通用接口，但其对无状态、即时模式的模式注入依赖，带来了隐性的每轮开销——即所谓的“MCP税”或“工具税”。从业者报告称，在典型的多服务器部署中，该开销介于约1万至6万token之间。这一额外负载会膨胀键值缓存，当上下文利用率接近70%左右的公开断裂点时，还会导致推理性能下降，并使token预算转化为持续的运营成本。

我们提出了**工具注意力（Tool Attention）**，一种位于中间件层的机制，将“Attention Is All You Need”范式从对token的自注意力推广到对工具的门控注意力。Tool Attention结合了以下三个核心组件：  
(i) 基于句子嵌入的意图模式重叠（ISO）评分；  
(ii) 一种感知状态的门控函数，用于强制执行前置条件和访问范围；  
(iii) 两阶段的懒加载模式加载器，仅在上下文中保留一个紧凑的摘要池，并仅对前k个被选中的工具动态引入完整的JSON模式。

我们在一个模拟的120工具、六服务器基准测试环境中进行了评估，各服务器的token数量已根据真实MCP部署的公开审计数据进行校准。在该仿真中，Tool Attention直接将每轮工具相关token数量减少了95.0%（从47.3k降至2.4k），并将有效上下文利用率（一种基于token比例的度量）从24%提升至91%。

任务成功率、延迟、成本及推理质量的端到端指标均基于实测token数量与公开部署遥测数据的组合推算得出，而非在实际LLM代理上直接测量。因此，所有结果均为**预测值**，我们在全文中均明确标注。综合来看，这些结果支持一个简单而有力的论点：对于可扩展的生成式智能系统而言，**协议层面的效率**，而非单纯的上下文长度，才是关键的制约因素。

本研究代码已开源，可通过以下链接获取：https://github.com/asadani/tool-attention

title: Less Is More: Measuring How LLM Involvement affects Chatbot Accuracy in Static Analysis
authors: Krishna Narasimhan
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to make static analysis tools accessible through natural language, yet existing systems differ in how much they delegate to the LLM without treating the degree of delegation as an independent variable. We compare three architectures along a spectrum of LLM involvement for translating natural language to Joern's query language \cpgql{}: direct query generation (\approach{1}), generation of a schema-constrained JSON intermediate representation (\approach{2}), and tool-augmented agentic generation (\approach{3}). These are evaluated on a benchmark of 20 code analysis tasks across three complexity tiers, using four open-weight models in a 2\(\times\)2 design (two model families \(\times\) two scales), each with three repetitions. The structured intermediate representation (\approach{2}) achieves the highest result match rates, outperforming direct generation by 15--25 percentage points on large models and surpassing the agentic approach despite the latter consuming 8\(\times\) more tokens. The benefit of structured intermediates is most pronounced for large models; for small models, schema compliance becomes the bottleneck. These findings suggest that in formally structured domains, constraining the LLM's output to a well-typed intermediate representation and delegating query construction to deterministic code yields better results than either unconstrained generation or iterative tool use.
title_zh: 少即是多：衡量大语言模型参与度对静态分析中聊天机器人准确性的影响
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）正越来越多地被用于通过自然语言使静态分析工具更易访问，然而现有系统在将任务委托给LLM的程度上存在差异，且未将这种委托程度视为一个独立变量。本文沿着LLM参与度的连续谱，比较了三种架构在将自然语言转换为Joern查询语言cpgql{}时的表现：直接查询生成（Approach 1）、生成受模式约束的JSON中间表示（Approach 2），以及工具增强的代理式生成（Approach 3）。我们在涵盖三个复杂度层级的20个代码分析任务基准上进行了评估，采用四种开源权重模型，设计为2×2结构（两个模型族 × 两个规模），每种配置重复三次。结果表明，结构化的中间表示（Approach 2）取得了最高的结果匹配率，在大模型上比直接生成高出15至25个百分点，并且尽管其消耗的token数量仅为代理式方法的1/8，仍显著优于后者。对于大模型而言，结构化中间表示的优势尤为明显；而对于小模型，模式合规性则成为主要瓶颈。这些发现表明，在形式化结构明确的领域中，将LLM输出限制在具有良好类型定义的中间表示，并将查询构建任务交由确定性代码处理，相比无约束生成或迭代式工具使用，能够获得更优的效果。

title: From If-Statements to ML Pipelines: Revisiting Bias in Code-Generation
authors: Minh Duc Bui, Xenia Heilmann, Mattia Cerrato, Manuel Mager, Katharina von der Wense
abstract: Prior work evaluates code generation bias primarily through simple conditional statements, which represent only a narrow slice of real-world programming and reveal solely overt, explicitly encoded bias. We demonstrate that this approach dramatically underestimates bias in practice by examining a more realistic task: generating machine learning (ML) pipelines. Testing both code-specialized and general-instruction large language models, we find that generated pipelines exhibit significant bias during feature selection. Sensitive attributes appear in 87.7% of cases on average, despite models demonstrably excluding irrelevant features (e.g., including "race" while dropping "favorite color" for credit scoring). This bias is substantially more prevalent than that captured by conditional statements, where sensitive attributes appear in only 59.2% of cases. These findings are robust across prompt mitigation strategies, varying numbers of attributes, and different pipeline difficulty levels. Our results challenge simple conditionals as valid proxies for bias evaluation and suggest current benchmarks underestimate bias risk in practical deployments.
title_zh: 从条件语句到机器学习流水线：重新审视代码生成中的偏差
abstract_zh: 先前的研究主要通过简单的条件语句来评估代码生成中的偏见，但这类方法仅反映了现实编程中的一小部分情况，且只能揭示显性编码的偏见。我们通过考察更具现实意义的任务——生成机器学习（ML）数据处理流程，证明了这种评估方式在实践中严重低估了偏见程度。在测试代码专用模型和通用指令大语言模型时，我们发现生成的流程在特征选择阶段表现出显著偏见：平均有87.7%的情况下，敏感属性被包含其中，尽管模型显然能够排除无关特征（例如，在信用评分任务中包含“种族”而剔除“最爱颜色”）。这一偏见程度远高于传统条件语句测试所捕捉到的结果——后者中敏感属性仅出现在59.2%的案例中。上述发现无论在提示缓解策略、属性数量变化还是不同流程复杂度下均保持稳健。我们的研究结果挑战了以简单条件语句作为偏见评估代理的有效性，并表明当前基准测试严重低估了实际部署中潜在的偏见风险。

title: MCP Pitfall Lab: Exposing Developer Pitfalls in MCP Tool Server Security under Multi-Vector Attacks
authors: Run Hao, Zhuoran Tan
abstract: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is increasingly adopted for tool-integrated LLM agents, but its multi-layer design and third-party server ecosystem expand risks across tool metadata, untrusted outputs, cross-tool flows, multimodal inputs, and supply-chain vectors. Existing MCP benchmarks largely measure robustness to malicious inputs but offer limited remediation guidance. We present MCP Pitfall Lab, a protocol-aware security testing framework that operationalizes developer pitfalls as reproducible scenarios and validates outcomes with MCP traces and objective validators (rather than agent self-report). We instantiate three workflow challenges (email, document, crypto) with six server variants (baseline and hardened) and model three attack families: tool-metadata poisoning, puppet servers, and multimodal image-to-tool chains, in a unified, trace-grounded evaluation. In Tier-1 static analysis over six variants (36 binary labels), our analyzer achieves F1 = 1.0 on four statically checkable pitfall classes (P1, P2, P5, P6) and flags cross-tool forwarding and image-to-tool leakage (P3, P4) as trace/dataflow-dependent. Applying recommended hardening eliminates all Tier-1 findings (29 to 0) and reduces the framework risk score (10.0 to 0.0) at a mean cost of 27 lines of code (LOC). Finally, in a preliminary 19-run corpus from the email system challenge (tool poisoning and puppet attacks), agent narratives diverge from trace evidence in 63.2% of runs and 100% of sink-action runs, motivating trace-based auditing and regression testing. Overall, Pitfall Lab enables practical, end-to-end assessment and hardening of MCP tool servers under realistic multi-vector conditions.
title_zh: MCP漏洞陷阱实验室：揭示多向量攻击下MCP工具服务器安全中的开发者陷阱
abstract_zh:
Model Context Protocol (MCP) 正在被越来越多地用于集成工具的大型语言模型（LLM）智能体中，但其多层次架构及第三方服务器生态体系也带来了多方面的安全风险，涵盖工具元数据、不可信输出、跨工具数据流、多模态输入以及供应链攻击路径。现有的MCP基准测试主要评估系统对恶意输入的鲁棒性，但在修复建议方面提供支持有限。本文提出 MCP Pitfall Lab——一个协议感知的安全测试框架，将开发者常见陷阱转化为可复现的测试场景，并通过MCP调用追踪与客观验证器（而非智能体自我报告）来验证结果。我们以三个工作流挑战（邮件处理、文档处理、加密应用）为基础，构建了六种服务器变体（基础版与加固版），并统一建模三类攻击模式：工具元数据污染、傀儡服务器、多模态图像到工具链攻击，在基于追踪证据的统一评估框架下进行分析。

在第一层级的静态分析中，针对六种服务器变体（共36个二分类标签），我们的分析器在四个静态可检测的陷阱类别（P1、P2、P5、P6）上达到 F1 = 1.0 的完美表现；同时识别出跨工具转发（P3）和图像到工具泄露（P4）为依赖追踪与数据流特征的问题。实施推荐的加固措施后，所有第一层级发现项（从29个降至0个）被消除，框架整体风险评分从10.0降至0.0，平均仅需增加27行代码（LOC）。最后，在邮件系统挑战的初步19次运行实验中（包含工具污染与傀儡攻击），智能体叙述与实际追踪证据存在分歧的比例高达63.2%，而在所有“汇点操作”（sink-action）运行中分歧率更是达到100%，这凸显了基于追踪证据的审计与回归测试的重要性。

总体而言，Pitfall Lab 实现了在真实多向量攻击环境下对MCP工具服务器的实用化、端到端评估与加固，为提升MCP生态系统的安全性提供了可落地的解决方案。

title: Reasoning Primitives in Hybrid and Non-Hybrid LLMs
authors: Shivam Rawat, Lucie Flek, Florian Mai, Nicholas Kluge Corrêa
abstract: Reasoning in large language models is often treated as a monolithic capability, but its observed gains may arise from more basic operations. We study reasoning through two such primitives, recall and state-tracking, and ask whether hybrid architectures that combine attention-based retrieval with recurrent state updates are better suited than attention-only models for tasks that jointly require both. Using matched Olmo3 transformer and hybrid models in instruction-tuned and reasoning-augmented variants, we evaluate these models on a set of controlled tasks involving a mixture of state-tracking and recall primitives, state-based recall. Across tasks, we notice that reasoning augmentation provides the largest overall improvement, substantially extending the range of difficulty over which models remain effective. We also notice that in certain tasks, the hybrid reasoning model remains substantially more robust as sequential dependence increases. In contrast, the transformer reasoning model degrades sharply in performance as task difficulty increases beyond a given threshold. These results suggest that reasoning tokens and architectural inductive biases contribute at different levels of the computational process: explicit reasoning can expand a model's effective operating range, but its benefit depends on how well the underlying architecture supports persistent state propagation. Given the small size of our case study, which involves a limited set of models and tasks, we present these findings as suggestive rather than conclusive and leave broader validation across model families, scales, and task variations to future work.
title_zh: 混合与非混合大语言模型中的推理原语
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型中的推理能力通常被视为一种整体性功能，但其表现出的提升可能源于更基础的操作。我们通过两种基本操作——回忆（recall）和状态追踪（state-tracking）来研究推理，并探讨：在需要同时具备这两种能力的任务中，结合注意力机制检索与循环状态更新的混合架构，是否比仅依赖注意力的模型表现更优。我们使用经过指令微调和推理增强的匹配版Olmo3 Transformer模型与混合模型，在一组包含状态追踪与回忆操作混合、以及基于状态的回忆任务的受控任务上进行评估。实验结果表明，推理增强带来的整体改进最为显著，大幅扩展了模型保持有效性的难度范围。此外，在某些任务中，随着序列依赖性的增加，混合推理模型仍表现出更强的鲁棒性；而纯Transformer推理模型在任务难度超过某一阈值后，性能则急剧下降。这些结果表明，推理标记与架构中的归纳偏置在计算过程的不同层次上发挥作用：显式的推理能够拓展模型的有效工作范围，但其效益取决于底层架构对持久状态传播的支持程度。由于本案例研究规模较小，涉及的模型和任务有限，因此上述发现仅为具有启发性的初步结论，尚不能得出定论，未来工作将致力于在更广泛的模型家族、不同规模及任务变体中进一步验证这些发现。

title: A pragmatic classification of AI incident trajectories
authors: Isaak Mengesha, Branwen Owen, Charlie Collins, Tina Wong, Simon Mylius, Peter Slattery, Sean McGregor
abstract: Public AI incident database counts conflate changes in reporting propensity, deployment growth, and shifts in harm frequency per unit of exposure. These issues introduce significant uncertainties challenging public and corporate policy frameworks centred on realized risks. We propose a simple framework that establishes clear points of inquiry, separately estimates exposure from harm-rate trends, and then classifies into meaningful trajectory categories for governance decisions. The framework combines a structured monitoring question format (SORT) to clarify coverage decisions, a tiered estimation procedure calibrated to available evidence, and LLM-assisted incident matching against public databases. Applied to various monitoring questions, we draw conclusions regarding the monitoring ecosystem more broadly: Providing an essential interpretative classification, determining what can and cannot be claimed, and establishing that exposure estimation is required as AI deployments become increasingly common.
title_zh: 人工智能事件轨迹的实用分类
abstract_zh: 公共人工智能事件数据库的统计结果，混淆了报告意愿的变化、部署规模的增长以及单位暴露量下伤害频率的变动。这些问题带来了显著的不确定性，对以实际风险为核心的公共与企业政策框架构成挑战。我们提出一个简单的分析框架：明确关键问题，分别估算暴露量与伤害率趋势，并据此将事件划分为具有治理意义的演变轨迹类别。该框架结合了结构化的监测问题格式（SORT），用于厘清覆盖范围的决策；采用分层估计方法，依据现有证据进行校准；并借助大语言模型（LLM）辅助比对公开数据库中的事件记录。应用于多种监测问题后，我们得出了关于监测生态系统的若干结论：提供必要的解释性分类，明确可主张与不可主张的内容，并确立一个基本前提——随着人工智能部署日益普遍，暴露量的估算已成为不可或缺的环节。

title: TopoStyle: Supporting Iterative Design with Generative AI for 2.5D Topology Optimization
authors: Shuyue Feng, Cedric Caremel, Yoshihiro Kawahara
abstract: Topology optimization(TO) is widely used in engineering because of its ability to save material and optimize structural performance. Although prior work has explored 2D human-centered design tool for TO, the results are often limited in variety and offer weak customizability. Meanwhile, due to the high computational and time costs of TO, researchers have attempted to address these issues using generative AI; however, such methods often provide limited interactivity. In addition, topology optimization in many cases needs to balance structural performance and aesthetic qualities through iterative design, a perspective that has rarely been emphasized in traditional TO. We present TopoStyle, an iterative design tool for 2.5D topology optimization using a 2D diffusion model. We explore two interaction methods. The first exports 3D parts to a graphical interface for hand-drawn interaction. The second enables direct interaction within 3D modeling software using points. Our tool also supports the use of masks to apply topology optimization to specific regions, allowing users to address customized design needs. We compare and evaluate both performance and interaction methods, and investigate how TopoStyle can balance performance and aesthetics while improving design efficiency through customization and iterative design. Finally, we demonstrate the application scenarios of TopoStyle through several design cases.
title_zh: TopoStyle：基于生成式AI的2.5D拓扑优化迭代设计支持
abstract_zh: 拓扑优化（Topology Optimization, TO）因其在节省材料和优化结构性能方面的优势，被广泛应用于工程领域。尽管已有研究探索了面向2D的人本化设计工具用于TO，但其结果往往种类有限，且定制能力较弱。同时，由于拓扑优化具有较高的计算和时间成本，研究人员尝试借助生成式AI来解决这些问题；然而，这类方法通常交互性较差。此外，在许多情况下，拓扑优化需要通过迭代设计在结构性能与美学品质之间取得平衡，这一视角在传统拓扑优化中却很少被强调。本文提出TopoStyle，一种基于2D扩散模型的2.5D拓扑优化迭代设计工具。我们探索了两种交互方式：第一种将3D部件导出至图形界面，支持手绘交互；第二种则允许用户在3D建模软件中直接通过点进行操作。此外，该工具还支持使用掩码对特定区域施加拓扑优化，从而满足用户的个性化设计需求。我们对比并评估了不同性能与交互方式的效果，并深入探讨了TopoStyle如何在提升设计效率的同时，通过定制化与迭代设计实现性能与美学之间的平衡。最后，我们通过多个设计案例展示了TopoStyle的应用场景。

title: SQLyzr: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Evaluation Platform for Text-to-SQL
authors: Sepideh Abedini, M. Tamer Özsu
abstract: Text-to-SQL models have significantly improved with the adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), leading to their increasing use in real-world applications. Although many benchmarks exist for evaluating the performance of text-to-SQL models, they often rely on a single aggregate score, lack evaluation under realistic settings, and provide limited insight into model behaviour across different query types. In this work, we present SQLyzr, a comprehensive benchmark and evaluation platform for text-to-SQL models. SQLyzr incorporates a diverse set of evaluation metrics that capture multiple aspects of generated queries, while enabling more realistic evaluation through workload alignment with real-world SQL usage patterns and database scaling. It further supports fine-grained query classification, error analysis, and workload augmentation, allowing users to better diagnose and improve text-to-SQL models. This demonstration showcases these capabilities through an interactive experience. Through SQLyzr's graphical interface, users can customize evaluation settings, analyze fine-grained reports, and explore additional features of the platform. We envision that SQLyzr facilitates the evaluation and iterative improvement of text-to-SQL models by addressing key limitations of existing benchmarks. The source code of SQLyzr is available at https://github.com/sepideh-abedini/SQLyzr.
title_zh: SQLyzr：一个全面的文本到SQL基准测试与评估平台
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的采用，文本到SQL模型已取得显著进步，因而越来越多地应用于实际场景中。尽管目前已有诸多用于评估文本到SQL模型性能的基准测试，但这些基准通常仅依赖单一综合评分，缺乏在真实场景下的评估，并且对模型在不同查询类型下的行为洞察有限。在本工作中，我们提出了SQLyzr——一个全面的文本到SQL模型基准测试与评估平台。SQLyzr整合了多样化的评估指标，能够从多个维度捕捉生成查询的质量；同时通过与真实世界SQL使用模式对齐的工作负载设计以及数据库规模扩展，实现了更贴近现实的评估。此外，该平台还支持细粒度查询分类、错误分析及工作负载增强，使用户能够更深入地诊断并改进文本到SQL模型。本次演示通过交互式体验展示了这些功能。借助SQLyzr的图形化界面，用户可自定义评估设置，分析细粒度报告，并探索平台的其他高级功能。我们相信，SQLyzr将通过解决现有基准测试的关键局限性，推动文本到SQL模型的评估与迭代优化。SQLyzr的源代码可在 https://github.com/sepideh-abedini/SQLyzr 获取。

title: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
authors: Bartosz Balis, Michal Orzechowski, Piotr Kica, Michal Dygas, Michal Kuszewski
abstract: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and infrastructure expertise. We propose an agentic architecture that closes this gap through three layers: an LLM interprets natural language into structured intents (semantic layer); validated generators produce reproducible workflow DAGs (deterministic layer); and domain experts author ``Skills'': markdown documents encoding vocabulary mappings, parameter constraints, and optimization strategies (knowledge layer). This decomposition confines LLM non-determinism to intent extraction: identical intents always yield identical workflows. We implement and evaluate the architecture on the 1000 Genomes population genetics workflow and Hyperflow WMS running on Kubernetes. In an ablation study on 150 queries, Skills raise full-match intent accuracy from 44% to 83%; skill-driven deferred workflow generation reduces data transfer by 92\%; and the end-to-end pipeline completes queries on Kubernetes with LLM overhead below 15 seconds and cost under $0.001 per query.
title_zh: 从研究问题到科学工作流：利用智能代理AI实现科学自动化
abstract_zh: 科学工作流系统能够自动执行任务——如调度、容错和资源管理——但无法处理其前序的语义转换环节。科学家仍需手动将研究问题转化为工作流规范，这一过程既需要领域知识，也要求对基础设施有深入了解。我们提出一种代理式架构，通过三个层次来弥合这一差距：首先，大语言模型（LLM）将自然语言解析为结构化的意图（语义层）；其次，经过验证的生成器可产出可复现的工作流有向无环图（确定性层）；第三，领域专家编写“技能”（Skills）——以Markdown文档形式呈现的词汇映射、参数约束及优化策略知识（知识层）。这种分层设计将LLM的非确定性限制在意图提取阶段：相同的意图始终生成相同的工作流。我们在1000基因组计划的人口遗传学工作流以及基于Kubernetes运行的Hyperflow工作流管理系统上实现了该架构，并进行了评估。在150个查询的消融实验中，引入“技能”后，完整匹配意图的准确率从44%提升至83%；基于技能驱动的延迟工作流生成使数据传输量减少92%；整个端到端流程在Kubernetes上完成查询时，LLM的额外开销低于15秒，每查询成本不足0.001美元。

title: Strategic Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Architecture for Cost-Effective Code Vulnerability Detection
authors: Zhaohui Geoffrey Wang
abstract: Automated code vulnerability detection is critical for software security, yet existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost. We propose a heterogeneous multi-agent architecture inspired by game-theoretic principles, combining cloud-based LLM experts with a local lightweight verifier. Our "3+1" architecture deploys three cloud-based expert agents (DeepSeek-V3) that analyze code from complementary perspectives - code structure, security patterns, and debugging logic - in parallel, while a local verifier (Qwen3-8B) performs adversarial validation at zero marginal cost. We formalize this design through a two-layer game framework: (1) a cooperative game among experts capturing super-additive value from diverse perspectives, and (2) an adversarial verification game modeling quality assurance incentives. Experiments on 262 real samples from the NIST Juliet Test Suite across 14 CWE types, with balanced vulnerable and benign classes, demonstrate that our approach achieves a 77.2% F1 score with 62.9% precision and 100% recall at $0.002 per sample - outperforming both a single-expert LLM baseline (F1 71.4%) and Cppcheck static analysis (MCC 0). The adversarial verifier significantly improves precision (+10.3 percentage points, p < 1e-6, McNemar's test) by filtering false positives, while parallel execution achieves a 3.0x speedup. Our work demonstrates that game-theoretic design principles can guide effective heterogeneous multi-agent architectures for cost-sensitive software engineering tasks.
title_zh: 面向成本效益的代码漏洞检测的策略性异构多智能体架构
abstract_zh: 自动化代码漏洞检测对于软件安全至关重要，但现有方法在检测准确率与计算成本之间面临根本性权衡。本文提出一种受博弈论启发的异构多智能体架构，结合基于云的大型语言模型（LLM）专家与本地轻量级验证器。我们的“3+1”架构部署了三个基于云的专家智能体（DeepSeek-V3），从互补视角——代码结构、安全模式和调试逻辑——并行分析代码；同时，一个本地验证器（Qwen3-8B）以零边际成本执行对抗性验证。我们通过双层博弈框架形式化该设计：(1) 专家之间的合作博弈，捕捉多元视角带来的超加性价值；(2) 对抗性验证博弈，建模质量保障的激励机制。在NIST Juliet测试套件的262个真实样本上进行实验，覆盖14种CWE类型，且漏洞与良性样本平衡，结果表明，本方法在每样本仅0.002美元的成本下，实现了77.2%的F1分数（精确率62.9%，召回率100%），显著优于单一专家LLM基线（F1 71.4%）和Cppcheck静态分析工具（MCC 0）。对抗性验证器显著提升了精确率（提升10.3个百分点，p < 1e-6，McNemar检验），有效过滤了误报；并行执行则实现了3.0倍的速度提升。本研究证明，博弈论设计原则可有效指导面向成本敏感型软件工程任务的异构多智能体架构构建。

title: Phenomenological Detector Design and Optimization in Vertically-Integrated Differentiable Full Simulations with Agentic-AI
authors: Wonyong Chung, Qibin Liu, Liangyu Wu, Julia Gonski
abstract: We present the first implementation of AI agents into the design and optimization of detectors in high-energy physics experiments via a bilevel optimization framework that vertically integrates detector geometry, front-end digitization, and high-level reconstruction algorithm parameters in differentiable full simulations. Using the example of a dual-readout, segmented crystal EM calorimeter with a baseline resolution of $3\%/\sqrt{E}$, we investigate the capabilities and value propositions of AI agents in the identification and reduction of key detector parameters and in the nonlinear traversal of a given detector design's full parameter space. We find that LLM-based reasoning models today, without being given additional experiment-specific context, are able to effectively execute complex workflows and proactively suggest generic but relevant avenues for further study or improvement. Here, we demonstrate an AI agent's ability to use the workflow to simultaneously optimize a representative subset of vertically integrated detector parameters: crystal granularity and length, number of ADC bits and sampling rate, and center-of-gravity hit-clustering radius. We find that effective integration of agents into the complex workflows of frontier areas of research not only significantly reduces labor and compute, but opens up efficient avenues for computational validation of first-principles design choices. While the ability to make autonomous leaps of physics-motivated judgment or insight is not demonstrated in this work, this study defines the current frontier of experimental design methods in high-energy physics.
title_zh: 基于代理-人工智能的垂直集成可微分全仿真中现象学探测器的设计与优化
abstract_zh: 我们首次通过双层优化框架，将人工智能代理（AI agents）引入高能物理实验中探测器的设计与优化，该框架在可微分的完整模拟中垂直整合了探测器几何结构、前端数字化以及高级重建算法参数。以基线分辨率约为 $3\%/\sqrt{E}$ 的双读出、分段晶体电磁量能器为例，我们研究了AI代理在识别和减少关键探测器参数方面的潜力及其价值主张，并探索其在给定探测器设计全参数空间中的非线性遍历能力。结果表明，当前基于大语言模型（LLM）的推理模型即使未提供额外的实验特定上下文，也能够有效执行复杂工作流程，并主动提出通用但相关的进一步研究或改进方向。在此工作中，我们展示了AI代理利用该工作流程同时优化一组代表性垂直集成探测器参数的能力：晶体颗粒度与长度、ADC位数与采样率，以及质心聚类半径。我们发现，将AI代理有效融入前沿科研领域的复杂工作流程，不仅显著降低了人力与计算成本，还为基于第一性原理的设计选择提供了高效的计算验证途径。尽管本研究尚未展示自主进行物理驱动的判断或洞察飞跃的能力，但它定义了当前高能物理实验设计方法的前沿水平。

title: PrismaDV: Automated Task-Aware Data Unit Test Generation
authors: Hao Chen, Arnab Phani, Sebastian Schelter
abstract: Data is a central resource for modern enterprises, and data validation is essential for ensuring the reliability of downstream applications. However, existing automated data unit testing frameworks are largely task-agnostic: they validate datasets without considering the semantics and requirements of the code that consumes the data. We present PrismaDV, a compound AI system that analyzes downstream task code together with dataset profiles to identify data access patterns, infer implicit data assumptions, and generate task-aware executable data unit tests. To further adapt the data unit tests over time to specific datasets and downstream tasks, we propose "Selective Informative Feedback for Task Adaptation" (SIFTA), a prompt-optimization framework that leverages the scarce outcomes from the execution of data unit tests and downstream tasks. We evaluate PrismaDV on two new benchmarks spanning 60 tasks across five datasets, where it consistently outperforms both task-agnostic and task-aware baselines in generating unit tests that reflect the end-to-end impact of data errors. Furthermore, we show that with SIFTA, we can automatically learn prompts for PrismaDV's modules that outperform prompts written by hand or generated from a generic prompt optimizer. We publicly release our benchmarks and prototype implementation.
title_zh: PrismaDV：自动化任务感知的数据单元测试生成
abstract_zh: 数据是现代企业的一项核心资源，而数据验证对于确保下游应用的可靠性至关重要。然而，现有的自动化数据单元测试框架大多与具体任务无关：它们在验证数据集时，并未考虑消费数据的代码的语义和需求。我们提出了 PrismaDV，一种复合型人工智能系统，该系统通过分析下游任务代码与数据集特征，识别数据访问模式，推断隐含的数据假设，并生成具有任务感知能力的可执行数据单元测试。为了进一步使数据单元测试能够随时间适应特定数据集和下游任务，我们提出了“面向任务适配的选择性信息反馈”（SIFTA）——一种提示优化框架，该框架利用数据单元测试和下游任务执行中稀缺的结果进行优化。我们在两个新基准上对 PrismaDV 进行了评估，涵盖五个数据集中的60个任务，结果表明，PrismaDV 在生成反映数据错误端到端影响的单元测试方面，始终优于既有的与任务无关及任务感知的基线方法。此外，我们还证明，借助 SIFTA，可以自动学习出优于人工编写或由通用提示优化器生成的 PrismaDV 模块提示。我们已公开发布相关基准数据集和原型实现。

title: Agentic AI-assisted coding offers a unique opportunity to instill epistemic grounding during software development
authors: Magnus Palmblad, Jared M. Ragland, Benjamin A. Neely
abstract: The capabilities of AI-assisted coding are progressing at breakneck speed. Chat-based vibe coding has evolved into fully fledged AI-assisted, agentic software development using agent scaffolds where the human developer creates a plan that agentic AIs implement. One current trend is utilizing documents beyond this plan document, such as project and method-scoped documents. Here we propose GROUNDING$.$md, a community-governed, field-scoped epistemic grounding document, using mass spectrometry-based proteomics as an example. This explicit field-scoped grounding document encodes Hard Constraints (non-negotiable validity invariants empirically required for scientific correctness) and Convention Parameters (community-agreed defaults) that override all other contexts to enforce validity, regardless of what the user prompts. In practice, this will empower a non-domain expert to generate code, tools, and software that have best practices baked in at the ground level, providing confidence to the software developer but also to those reviewing or using the final product. Undoubtedly it is easier to have agentic AIs adhere to guidelines than humans, and this opportunity allows for organizations to develop epistemic grounding documents in such a way as to keep domain experts in the loop in a future of democratized generation of bespoke software solutions.
title_zh: 代理型AI辅助编程为在软件开发过程中植入认识论基础提供了独特机遇。
abstract_zh: 人工智能辅助编程的能力正以惊人的速度发展。基于聊天的“氛围式编码”已演变为完整的、由智能体驱动的软件开发，其核心是使用智能体架构（agent scaffolds），即人类开发者制定计划，而智能体AI负责具体实现。当前的一个趋势是，不再局限于仅依赖计划文档，而是扩展到利用项目级或方法级的其他文档。在此，我们提出 GROUNDING.md，一种由社区共同治理、面向特定领域的知识基础文档，并以基于质谱的蛋白质组学为例进行说明。该显式的领域级知识基础文档编码了“硬性约束”（Hard Constraints，即确保科学正确的不可妥协的实证要求）和“约定参数”（Convention Parameters，即社区公认的默认设置），这些参数会覆盖所有其他上下文，强制保证生成内容的有效性，无论用户输入何种提示。实际上，这将使非本领域专家也能生成符合最佳实践的代码、工具和软件，从底层就嵌入了可靠性保障，不仅增强软件开发者的信心，也使审查者和最终使用者更加安心。毫无疑问，让智能体AI遵循规范比让人类更容易，这一机遇使得组织能够以一种让领域专家持续参与的方式，构建知识基础文档，从而在个性化软件解决方案广泛普及的未来中，保持专业深度与质量控制。

title: StabilizerBench: A Benchmark for AI-Assisted Quantum Error Correction Circuit Synthesis
authors: Andres Paz, Christian Tarta, Cordelia Yuqiao Li, Mayee Sun, Sarju Patel, Sylvie Lausier
abstract: As quantum hardware scales toward fault tolerant operation, the demand for correct quantum error correction (QEC) circuits far outpaces manual design capacity. AI agents offer a promising path to automating this synthesis, yet no benchmark exists to measure their progress on the specialized task of generating QEC circuits. We introduce StabilizerBench, a benchmark suite of 192 stabilizer codes spanning 12 families, 4-196 qubits, and distances 2-21, organized into three tasks of increasing difficulty: state preparation circuit generation, circuit optimization under semantic constraints, and fault tolerant circuit synthesis. Although motivated by QEC, stabilizer circuits exercise core competencies required for general quantum programming, including gate decomposition, qubit routing, and semantic preserving transformations, while admitting efficient verification via the Gottesman Knill theorem, enabling the benchmark to scale to large codes without the exponential cost of full unitary comparison. We define a unified generator weighted scoring system with two tiers: a capability score measuring breadth of success and a quality score capturing circuit merit. We also introduce continuous fault tolerance and optimization metrics that grade error resilience and circuit improvements beyond binary pass or fail. Following the design of classical benchmarks such as SWE-bench, StabilizerBench specifies inputs, verification oracles, and scoring but leaves prompts and agent strategies open. We evaluate three frontier AI agents and find the benchmark discriminates across models and tasks with substantial headroom for improvement.
title_zh: StabilizerBench：用于人工智能辅助量子纠错电路综合的基准测试
abstract_zh: 随着量子硬件向容错操作方向发展，对正确量子纠错（QEC）电路的需求远远超出了人工设计的能力。人工智能代理为自动化合成这类电路提供了有前景的路径，但目前尚无基准来衡量其在生成QEC电路这一专门任务上的进展。我们提出了StabilizerBench，一个包含192个稳定子码的基准套件，涵盖12类编码、4至196个量子比特以及2至21的距离，按难度递增分为三个任务：状态制备电路生成、语义约束下的电路优化，以及容错电路合成。尽管该基准以QEC为出发点，但稳定子电路涵盖了通用量子编程所需的核心能力，包括门分解、量子比特路由和保持语义的变换；同时，借助Gottesman-Knill定理可实现高效验证，使得该基准能够扩展到大规模编码，而无需承担全幺正比较带来的指数级成本。我们定义了一种统一的生成器加权评分系统，包含两个层级：能力得分用于衡量成功范围的广度，质量得分则反映电路本身的优劣。此外，我们引入了连续的容错性和优化度量，能够评估错误鲁棒性及电路改进程度，超越传统的“通过/失败”二元判断。受经典基准（如SWE-bench）设计启发，StabilizerBench明确定义了输入、验证预言机和评分机制，但保留了提示词和智能体策略的开放性。我们对三种前沿AI代理进行了评估，结果表明该基准能有效区分不同模型与任务，并显示出显著的提升空间。

title: CoFEE: Reasoning Control for LLM-Based Feature Discovery
authors: Maximilian Westermann, Ben Griffin, Aaron Ontoyin Yin, Zakari Salifu, Yagiz Ihlamur, Kelvin Amoaba, Joseph Ternasky, Fuat Alican, Yigit Ihlamur
abstract: Feature discovery from complex unstructured data is fundamentally a reasoning problem: it requires identifying abstractions that are predictive of a target outcome while avoiding leakage, proxies, and post-outcome signals. With the introduction of ever-improving Large Language Models (LLMs), our method provides a structured method for addressing this challenge. LLMs are well suited for this task by being able to process large amounts of information, but unconstrained feature generation can lead to weak features. In this work, we study reasoning control in LLMs by inducing cognitive behaviors for improving feature discovery. We introduce CoFEE (Cognitive Feature Engineering Engine), a reasoning control framework that enforces cognitive behaviors in how the LLM reasons during feature discovery. From a machine learning perspective, these cognitive behaviors act as structured inductive biases over the space of candidate features generated by the model. These behaviors have been exploited with success in ML models, and include backward chaining from outcomes, subgoal decomposition, verification against observability and leakage criteria, and explicit backtracking of rejected reasoning paths. In a controlled comparison, we show that enforcing cognitive behaviors yields features with higher empirical predictability than those under unconstrained vanilla LLM prompts. CoFEE achieves an average Success Rate Score that is 15.2% higher than the vanilla approach, while generating 29% fewer features and reducing costs by 53.3%. Using held-out feature evaluation, we assess whether cognitively induced features generalize beyond the data used for discovery. Our results indicate that, in our evaluated setting, reasoning control is associated with improvements in quality and efficiency of LLM-based feature discovery.
title_zh: CoFEE：基于大语言模型的特征发现中的推理控制
abstract_zh: 从复杂非结构化数据中发现特征本质上是一个推理问题：它要求识别出能够预测目标结果的抽象特征，同时避免信息泄露、代理变量以及事后信号。随着日益改进的大语言模型（LLMs）的出现，我们的方法提供了一种系统化的解决方案来应对这一挑战。尽管LLMs在处理大量信息方面具有天然优势，但若不加约束地生成特征，往往会导致特征质量低下。在本研究中，我们通过引导认知行为来控制LLM的推理过程，以提升特征发现的效果。为此，我们提出了CoFEE（Cognitive Feature Engineering Engine），一个推理控制框架，用于在LLM进行特征发现时强制执行特定的认知行为。从机器学习的角度看，这些认知行为可被视为对模型生成候选特征空间的结构化归纳偏置。这类行为在以往的机器学习模型中已被成功应用，包括从结果反向推导（backward chaining）、子目标分解、基于可观测性与信息泄露标准的验证，以及对被拒绝推理路径的显式回溯。在受控对比实验中，我们证明了强制执行认知行为所生成的特征，在经验预测能力上显著优于未经约束的原始LLM提示所生成的特征。CoFEE在平均成功率评分上比传统方法高出15.2%，同时生成的特征数量减少29%，成本降低53.3%。通过使用保留的特征评估方法，我们进一步检验了这些经认知引导生成的特征是否能在发现所用数据之外的场景中实现泛化。结果表明，在我们评估的设定下，推理控制显著提升了基于LLM的特征发现的质量与效率。

title: SpecSyn: LLM-based Synthesis and Refinement of Formal Specifications for Real-world Program Verification
authors: Lezhi Ma, Shangqing Liu, Yi Li, Qiong Wu, Han Wang, Lei Bu
abstract: Program verification is a formal technique to rigorously ensure the correctness and fault-freeness of software systems. However, constructing comprehensive interprocedural specifications for full verification obligations is time-consuming and labor-intensive, giving rise to automated specification generation approaches. Despite the significant advancements in these approaches brought by Large Language Models (LLMs), existing LLM-empowered approaches still suffer from significant limitations: they lack effective strategies for handling sizable input programs, and are typically equipped with no mechanisms to evaluate and guarantee the strength of the generated specifications. The limitations impair their ability to extract precise specifications from real-world complicated programs to support the verification of target properties, thereby hindering the applicability of existing approaches in verification tasks on real-world programs. To remedy this gap, we propose SpecSyn, a novel LLM-based specification generation method. SpecSyn first decomposes the input program into individual segments, which are handled respectively by the subsequent iterative specification generation process. Innovatively, we incorporate into the process a specification refinement mechanism based on semantic-non-equivalent program mutations and variant discrimination, assessing and enhancing the semantic strength of the generated specifications. Extensive experiments show that SpecSyn maintains high precision over 90% and outstanding recall over 75%, significantly outperforming existing LLM-based approaches. In further evaluations, SpecSyn successfully handles 1071 out of 1365 target properties for open-source programs, proving its applicability on real-world program verification tasks.
title_zh: SpecSyn：基于大语言模型的现实世界程序验证形式化规范生成与优化
abstract_zh: 程序验证是一种形式化技术，旨在严格确保软件系统的正确性和无故障性。然而，构建全面的跨过程规范以满足完整的验证需求既耗时又费力，这促使了自动化规范生成方法的发展。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在该领域带来了显著进展，但现有的基于LLM的方法仍存在明显局限：它们缺乏有效处理大规模输入程序的策略，且通常不具备评估和保证生成规范强度的机制。这些局限性导致其难以从现实世界中复杂的程序中提取出精确的规范，从而无法有效支持目标属性的验证，限制了现有方法在真实程序验证任务中的应用。为弥补这一不足，我们提出了SpecSyn——一种新型的基于大语言模型的规范生成方法。SpecSyn首先将输入程序分解为若干独立片段，并由后续的迭代式规范生成流程分别处理。创新性地，我们在过程中引入了一种基于语义非等价程序变异与变体判别的规范精炼机制，用于评估并增强生成规范的语义强度。大量实验表明，SpecSyn在保持超过90%高精度的同时，召回率也达到75%以上，显著优于现有的基于LLM的方法。在进一步的评估中，SpecSyn成功处理了1365个开源程序中的1071个目标属性，充分证明了其在真实程序验证任务中的实际适用性。

title: Efficient Agent Evaluation via Diversity-Guided User Simulation
authors: Itay Nakash, George Kour, Ateret Anaby-Tavor
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as customer-facing agents, yet evaluating their reliability remains challenging due to stochastic, multi-turn interactions. Current evaluation protocols rely on linear Monte Carlo rollouts of complete agent-user conversations to estimate success. However, this approach is computationally inefficient, repeatedly regenerating identical early prefixes, and often fails to uncover deep failure modes that arise from rare user behaviors. We introduce DIVERT (Diversity-Induced Evaluation via Branching of Trajectories), an efficient, snapshot-based, coverage-guided user simulation framework for systematic exploration of agent-user interactions. DIVERT captures the full agent-environment state at critical decision points and resumes execution from these snapshots, enabling reuse of shared conversation prefixes and reducing redundant computation. From each junction, the framework branches using targeted, diversity-inducing user responses, allowing directed exploration of alternative interaction paths. By focusing evaluation on semantically diverse and underexplored trajectories, DIVERT improves both efficiency and coverage. Empirical results show that it discovers more failures per token compared to standard linear rollout protocols, while expanding the set of tasks on which failures are identified.
title_zh: 通过多样性引导的用户模拟实现高效智能体评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地被用作面向客户的智能代理，但评估其可靠性仍面临挑战，原因在于这些模型与用户之间的交互具有随机性且涉及多轮对话。当前的评估方法依赖于对完整对话流程进行线性蒙特卡洛模拟来估算成功率，然而这种方法计算效率低下，重复生成相同的早期对话前缀，并且往往无法发现由罕见用户行为引发的深层故障模式。为此，我们提出了DIVERT（基于轨迹分叉的多样性诱导评估，Diversity-Induced Evaluation via Branching of Trajectories），一种高效、基于快照、以覆盖度为导向的用户模拟框架，用于系统性探索代理与用户之间的交互。DIVERT在关键决策点捕获完整的代理-环境状态，并从这些快照处恢复执行，从而实现共享对话前缀的复用，减少冗余计算。在每个关键节点，该框架通过采用有针对性的、促进多样性的用户响应进行分叉，引导探索不同的交互路径。通过聚焦于语义上多样化且未充分探索的轨迹，DIVERT显著提升了评估的效率与覆盖范围。实证结果表明，相较于传统的线性回放协议，DIVERT在单位token内发现了更多的失败案例，同时扩展了能够识别出故障的任务集合。

title: VLAA-GUI: Knowing When to Stop, Recover, and Search, A Modular Framework for GUI Automation
authors: Qijun Han, Haoqin Tu, Zijun Wang, Haoyue Dai, Yiyang Zhou, Nancy Lau, Alvaro A. Cardenas, Yuhui Xu, Ran Xu, Caiming Xiong, Zeyu Zheng, Huaxiu Yao, Yuyin Zhou, Cihang Xie
abstract: Autonomous GUI agents face two fundamental challenges: early stopping, where agents prematurely declare success without verifiable evidence, and repetitive loops, where agents cycle through the same failing actions without recovery. We present VLAA-GUI, a modular GUI agentic framework built around three integrated components that guide the system on when to Stop, Recover, and Search. First, a mandatory Completeness Verifier enforces UI-observable success criteria and verification at every finish step -- with an agent-level verifier that cross-examines completion claims with decision rules, rejecting those lacking direct visual evidence. Second, a mandatory Loop Breaker provides multi-tier filtering: switching interaction mode after repeated failures, forcing strategy changes after persistent screen-state recurrence, and binding reflection signals to strategy shifts. Third, an on-demand Search Agent searches online for unfamiliar workflows by directly querying a capable LLM with search ability, returning results as plain text. We additionally integrate a Coding Agent for code-intensive actions and a Grounding Agent for precise action grounding, both invoked on demand when required. We evaluate VLAA-GUI across five top-tier backbones, including Opus 4.5, 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro, on two benchmarks with Linux and Windows tasks, achieving top performance on both (77.5% on OSWorld and 61.0% on WindowsAgentArena). Notably, three of the five backbones surpass human performance (72.4%) on OSWorld in a single pass. Ablation studies show that all three proposed components consistently improve a strong backbone, while a weaker backbone benefits more from these tools when the step budget is sufficient. Further analysis also shows that the Loop Breaker nearly halves wasted steps for loop-prone models.
title_zh: VLAA-GUI：何时停止、恢复与搜索——一种模块化的GUI自动化框架
abstract_zh: 自主GUI代理面临两大根本性挑战：过早终止（early stopping），即代理在缺乏可验证证据的情况下过早宣布成功；以及重复循环（repetitive loops），即代理反复执行相同的失败操作而无法自我恢复。我们提出VLAA-GUI，一种模块化的GUI智能体框架，围绕三个集成组件构建，分别指导系统何时“停止”、“恢复”和“搜索”。首先，强制性的完整性验证器（Completeness Verifier）在每一步结束时都强制执行可从用户界面观察到的成功标准与验证机制——通过代理级别的验证器对完成声明进行交叉检验，依据决策规则拒绝那些缺乏直接视觉证据的声明。其次，强制性的循环打破器（Loop Breaker）提供多层级过滤：在连续失败后切换交互模式，当屏幕状态持续重复出现时强制策略变更，并将反思信号与策略调整绑定。第三，按需调用的搜索代理（Search Agent）能够通过直接向具备搜索能力的强大大语言模型查询，获取关于不熟悉工作流的在线信息，并以纯文本形式返回结果。此外，我们还集成了代码代理（Coding Agent）用于处理高代码密集型任务，以及定位代理（Grounding Agent）用于精确的动作定位，两者均在需要时按需调用。我们在五个顶级基础模型（包括Opus 4.5、4.6及Gemini 3.1 Pro）上对VLAA-GUI进行了评估，涵盖Linux和Windows两类任务的两个基准测试，均取得了顶尖性能（OSWorld达77.5%，WindowsAgentArena达61.0%）。值得注意的是，在单次运行中，五种基础模型中有三种在OSWorld上超越了人类表现（72.4%）。消融实验表明，这三个提出的组件在增强强基线模型方面始终带来提升，而对较弱基线模型而言，当步骤预算充足时，这些工具带来的增益更为显著。进一步分析显示，循环打破器几乎将循环倾向模型的无效步骤数量减少了一半。

title: To See the Unseen: on the Generalization Ability of Transformers in Symbolic Reasoning
authors: Nevena Lazić, Liam Fowl, András György, Csaba Szepesvári
abstract: We investigate the ability of decoder-only transformer models to perform abstract symbolic reasoning; specifically solving propositional logic reasoning problems given in-context. Previous work demonstrated that models fail to generalize to problems involving variable names that were not observed during training, and it was shown that one reason behind this is the difficulty of copying (or generating) unseen tokens. We show both theoretically and empirically that a particular representational collapse also has a crucial role: the unembeddings (last-layer weights) of unseen tokens collapse to nearly the same vector during training. The collapse makes distinguishing multiple unseen variables difficult for the model (especially when the embedding and unembedding parameters are shared), and provides a mechanistic explanation for the effectiveness of existing heuristic interventions like "active forgetting", which periodically reset the token (un)embeddings. Based on these observations, we devise a combination of techniques, involving a small architecture change facilitating copying, data diversity, and freezing or resetting (un)embeddings, that achieves generalization to unseen tokens. We support our claims with extensive controlled experiments on propositional logic reasoning problems. Beyond synthetic experiments, we also observe evidence of (un)embedding collapse in the open-weight models in the Gemma 3 family, which includes 99 unused tokens reserved for downstream use. Empirically we find that the correlated embeddings of these tokens are a poor initialization for finetuning applications.
title_zh: 看见无形：关于Transformer在符号推理中的泛化能力
abstract_zh:
我们研究了仅解码器的Transformer模型在执行抽象符号推理方面的能力，具体是解决以上下文形式给出的命题逻辑推理问题。先前的研究表明，当问题中涉及训练期间未见过的变量名称时，这些模型无法实现有效泛化，其中一个原因是模型难以复制（或生成）未见过的标记。本文从理论和实证两个层面证明，一种特定的表征坍缩现象也起到了关键作用：在训练过程中，未见过标记的反嵌入向量（即最后一层权重）会坍缩为几乎相同的向量。这种坍缩使得模型难以区分多个未见过的变量（尤其是在嵌入与反嵌入参数共享的情况下），从而为现有启发式干预方法（如“主动遗忘”）的有效性提供了机制解释——“主动遗忘”通过周期性地重置标记（反）嵌入来缓解该问题。

基于上述观察，我们设计了一套综合技术方案，包括微小的架构改进以增强复制能力、提升数据多样性，以及对（反）嵌入参数进行冻结或重置。该方案成功实现了对未见过标记的泛化能力。我们通过大量受控实验，在命题逻辑推理任务上充分验证了上述主张。

除了合成实验外，我们在Gemma 3系列的开源模型中也发现了（反）嵌入坍缩的证据，该系列模型保留了99个未使用的标记供下游应用使用。实证结果表明，这些标记的关联嵌入作为微调任务的初始化方式效果较差。

title: When Agents Look the Same: Quantifying Distillation-Induced Similarity in Tool-Use Behaviors
authors: Chenghao Yang, Yuning Zhang, Zhoufutu Wen, Tao Gong, Jiaheng Liu, Qi Chu, Nenghai Yu
abstract: Model distillation is a primary driver behind the rapid progress of LLM agents, yet it often leads to behavioral homogenization. Many emerging agents share nearly identical reasoning steps and failure modes, suggesting they may be distilled echoes of a few dominant teachers. Existing metrics, however, fail to distinguish mandatory behaviors required for task success from non-mandatory patterns that reflect a model's autonomous preferences.
