We propose two complementary metrics to isolate non-mandatory behavioral patterns: \textbf{Response Pattern Similarity (RPS)} for verbal alignment and \textbf{Action Graph Similarity (AGS)} for tool-use habits modeled as directed graphs. Evaluating 18 models from 8 providers on $τ$-Bench and $τ^2$-Bench against Claude Sonnet 4.5 (thinking), we find that within-family model pairs score 5.9 pp higher in AGS than cross-family pairs, and that Kimi-K2 (thinking) reaches 82.6\% $S_{\text{node}}$ and 94.7\% $S_{\text{dep}}$, exceeding Anthropic's own Opus 4.1. A controlled distillation experiment further confirms that AGS distinguishes teacher-specific convergence from general improvement. RPS and AGS capture distinct behavioral dimensions (Pearson $r$ = 0.491), providing complementary diagnostic signals for behavioral convergence in the agent ecosystem. Our code is available at https://github.com/Syuchin/AgentEcho.
title_zh: 当代理看起来相同时：量化工具使用行为中由知识蒸馏引起的相似性
abstract_zh: 模型蒸馏是推动大语言模型（LLM）智能体快速发展的主要驱动力，但往往导致行为同质化。许多新兴智能体展现出几乎完全相同的推理步骤和失败模式，表明它们可能只是少数主导教师模型的“蒸馏回声”。然而，现有评估指标难以区分完成任务所必需的强制性行为与反映模型自主偏好的非强制性模式。为此，我们提出两种互补的度量方法，以分离出非强制性行为模式：**响应模式相似性（Response Pattern Similarity, RPS）** 用于衡量语言表达上的对齐程度，以及**动作图相似性（Action Graph Similarity, AGS）** 用于建模工具使用习惯的有向图结构。我们在 $τ$-Bench 和 $τ^2$-Bench 上对来自8家厂商的18个模型进行评估，以 Claude Sonnet 4.5（思维模式）为基准，发现同家族模型对在 AGS 上得分比跨家族模型高 5.9 个百分点；其中 Kimi-K2（思维模式）的节点相似度 $S_{\text{node}}$ 达到 82.6%，依赖关系相似度 $S_{\text{dep}}$ 高达 94.7%，甚至超过 Anthropic 自身的 Opus 4.1。一项受控蒸馏实验进一步验证了 AGS 能有效区分教师特异性收敛与普遍性能提升。RPS 与 AGS 捕捉的是不同维度的行为特征（皮尔逊相关系数 $r = 0.491$），为智能体生态中的行为趋同现象提供了互补的诊断信号。我们的代码已开源，地址为 https://github.com/Syuchin/AgentEcho。

title: Doubly Saturated Ramsey Graphs: A Case Study in Computer-Assisted Mathematical Discovery
authors: Benjamin Przybocki, John Mackey, Marijn J. H. Heule, Bernardo Subercaseaux
abstract: Ramsey-good graphs are graphs that contain neither a clique of size $s$ nor an independent set of size $t$. We study doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, defined as Ramsey-good graphs in which the addition or removal of any edge necessarily creates an $s$-clique or a $t$-independent set. We present a method combining SAT solving with bespoke LLM-generated code to discover infinite families of such graphs, answering a question of Grinstead and Roberts from 1982. In addition, we use LLMs to generate and formalize correctness proofs in Lean. This case study highlights the potential of integrating automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification to accelerate mathematical discovery. We argue that such tool-driven workflows will play an increasingly central role in experimental mathematics.
title_zh: 双重饱和拉姆齐图：计算机辅助数学发现的一个案例研究
abstract_zh: Ramsey-优良图是指既不包含大小为 $s$ 的团，也不包含大小为 $t$ 的独立集的图。我们研究了双重饱和的Ramsey-优良图，即在其中任意添加或删除一条边都会导致出现一个 $s$-团或一个 $t$-独立集的Ramsey-优良图。本文提出了一种结合SAT求解与定制化大语言模型（LLM）生成代码的方法，以发现此类图的无限家族，从而回答了Grinstead和Roberts于1982年提出的问题。此外，我们还利用大语言模型生成并形式化了在Lean中的正确性证明。这一案例研究凸显了将自动推理、大语言模型与形式化验证相结合，在加速数学发现方面的巨大潜力。我们认为，这类以工具驱动的工作流将在实验数学中发挥越来越核心的作用。

title: CrossCommitVuln-Bench: A Dataset of Multi-Commit Python Vulnerabilities Invisible to Per-Commit Static Analysis
authors: Arunabh Majumdar
abstract: We present CrossCommitVuln-Bench, a curated benchmark of 15 real-world Python vulnerabilities (CVEs) in which the exploitable condition was introduced across multiple commits - each individually benign to per-commit static analysis - but collectively critical. We manually annotate each CVE with its contributing commit chain, a structured rationale for why each commit evades per-commit analysis, and baseline evaluations using Semgrep and Bandit in both per-commit and cumulative scanning modes. Our central finding: the per-commit detection rate (CCDR) is 13% across all 15 vulnerabilities - 87% of chains are invisible to per-commit SAST. Critically, both per-commit detections are qualitatively poor: one occurs on commits framed as security fixes (where developers suppress the alert), and the other detects only the minor hardcoded-key component while completely missing the primary vulnerability (200+ unprotected API endpoints). Even in cumulative mode (full codebase present), the detection rate is only 27%, confirming that snapshot-based SAST tools often miss vulnerabilities whose introduction spans multiple commits. The dataset, annotation schema, evaluation scripts, and reproducible baselines are released under open-source licenses to support research on cross-commit vulnerability detection.
title_zh: CrossCommitVuln-Bench：一个针对跨提交Python漏洞的基准数据集，这些漏洞对单个提交的静态分析方法不可见
abstract_zh: 我们提出了CrossCommitVuln-Bench，这是一个精心整理的基准数据集，包含15个真实世界中的Python漏洞（CVE），这些漏洞的可利用条件是在多个提交中逐步引入的——每个提交单独来看都是无害的，无法被逐提交静态分析工具发现，但多个提交共同作用后却构成了严重安全威胁。我们手动标注了每个CVE所涉及的提交链，并为每条提交链提供了结构化的解释，说明为何单个提交难以通过静态分析识别；同时，我们使用Semgrep和Bandit在逐提交与累积扫描两种模式下进行了基线评估。核心发现如下：在所有15个漏洞中，逐提交检测率（CCDR）仅为13%——87%的漏洞引入链条对逐提交SAST工具完全不可见。更关键的是，即便在逐提交模式下被检测到的两个案例也存在严重缺陷：其中一个出现在被开发者标记为“安全修复”的提交中（导致警报被抑制），另一个仅检测到了次要的硬编码密钥问题，而完全忽略了主要漏洞（200多个未受保护的API端点）。即使在累积模式下（即完整代码库可见），检测率也仅为27%，这证实了基于快照的SAST工具往往无法捕捉那些跨越多个提交才最终形成的安全漏洞。该数据集、标注规范、评估脚本以及可复现的基线结果均已开源发布，旨在支持跨提交漏洞检测领域的研究工作。

title: SPAC: Automating FPGA-based Network Switches with Protocol Adaptive Customization
authors: Guoyu Li, Yang Cao, Lucas H L Ng, Alexander Charlton, Qianzhou Wang, Will Punter, Philippos Papaphilippou, Ce Guo, Hongxiang Fan, Wayne Luk, Saman Amarasinghe, Ajay Brahmakshatriya
abstract: With network requirements diverging across emerging applications, latency-critical services demand minimal logic delay, while hyperscale training and collectives require sustained line-rate throughput for synchronized bulk transfers. This divergence creates an urgent need for custom network switches tailored to specialized protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. This paper presents SPAC (Switch and Protocol Adaptive Customization), a novel approach that automates the generation of FPGA-based network switches co-optimized for custom protocols and application-specific traffic patterns. SPAC introduces a unified workflow with a domain-specific language (DSL) for protocol-architecture co-design, a library of modular HLS-based adaptive switch components, and a trace-aware Design Space Exploration (DSE) engine. By providing a multi-fidelity simulation stack, SPAC enables rapid identification of Pareto-optimal designs prior to deployment. We demonstrate the efficacy of the domain-specific adaptation of SPAC across a spectrum of real-world scenarios, spanning from latency-sensitive sensor and HFT networks to hyperscale datacenter fabrics. Experimental results show that by tailoring the micro-architecture and protocol to the specific workload, SPAC-generated designs reduce LUT and BRAM usage by 55% and 53%, respectively. Compared to fixed-architecture counterparts, SPAC delivers latency reductions ranging from 7.8% to 38.4% across various tasks while maintaining adequate resource consumption and packet drop rate.
title_zh: SPAC：通过协议自适应定制自动化FPGA-based网络交换机
abstract_zh: 随着新兴应用对网络需求的多样化，对延迟敏感的服务要求极低的逻辑延迟，而超大规模训练和集体通信则需要持续的线速吞吐能力以支持同步的大批量数据传输。这种需求差异催生了对针对特定协议和应用特征流量模式量身定制的网络交换机的迫切需求。本文提出了一种名为SPAC（Switch and Protocol Adaptive Customization）的新方法，该方法可自动构建基于FPGA的网络交换机，使其在自定义协议与应用特定流量模式方面实现协同优化。SPAC引入了一个统一的工作流程，包括用于协议-架构协同设计的领域专用语言（DSL）、一套基于HLS的模块化可适应交换组件库，以及一个基于追踪感知的架构探索（DSE）引擎。通过提供多层次保真度的仿真栈，SPAC能够在部署前快速识别出帕累托最优的设计方案。我们在一系列真实场景中验证了SPAC在领域特异性适配方面的有效性，涵盖从对延迟敏感的传感器网络和高频交易网络到超大规模数据中心Fabric的各种应用场景。实验结果表明，通过针对具体工作负载定制微架构和协议，SPAC生成的设计在LUT和BRAM资源使用上分别降低了55%和53%。相较于固定架构的替代方案，SPAC在各类任务中实现了7.8%至38.4%的延迟降低，同时保持了合理的资源消耗和包丢弃率。

title: mcdok at SemEval-2026 Task 13: Finetuning LLMs for Detection of Machine-Generated Code
authors: Adam Skurla, Dominik Macko, Jakub Simko
abstract: Multi-domain detection of the machine-generated code snippets in various programming languages is a challenging task. SemEval-2026 Task~13 copes with this challenge in various angles, as a binary detection problem as well as attribution of the source. Specifically, its subtasks also cover generator LLM family detection, as well as a hybrid code co-generated by humans and machines, or adversarially modified codes hiding its origin. Our submitted systems adjusted the existing mdok approach (focused on machine-generated text detection) to these specific kinds of problems by exploring various base models, more suitable for code understanding. The results indicate that the submitted systems are competitive in all three subtasks. However, the margins from the top-performing systems are significant, and thus further improvements are possible.
title_zh: mcdok 在 SemEval-2026 任务13中的表现：微调大语言模型以检测机器生成的代码
abstract_zh: 在多种编程语言中检测机器生成的代码片段是一项具有挑战性的任务。SemEval-2026 任务13从多个角度应对这一挑战，既将其作为二分类检测问题，也涉及来源归属问题。具体而言，其子任务还包括识别生成器所属的大语言模型（LLM）家族，以及检测由人类与机器共同生成的混合代码，或经过对抗性修改以隐藏其来源的代码。我们提交的系统通过探索更适用于代码理解的各类基础模型，对现有的mdok方法（专注于机器生成文本检测）进行了调整，以应对这些特定问题。实验结果表明，我们的系统在所有三个子任务中均表现具有竞争力。然而，与表现最佳的系统相比，仍有显著差距，因此仍有进一步提升的空间。

title: Prefix Parsing is Just Parsing
authors: Clemente Pasti, Andreas Opedal, Timothy J. O'Donnell, Ryan Cotterell, Tim Vieira
abstract: Prefix parsing asks whether an input prefix can be extended to a complete string generated by a given grammar. In the weighted setting, it also provides prefix probabilities, which are central to context-free language modeling, psycholinguistic analysis, and syntactically constrained generation from large language models. We introduce the prefix grammar transformation, an efficient reduction of prefix parsing to ordinary parsing. Given a grammar, our method constructs another grammar that generates exactly the prefixes of its original strings. Prefix parsing is then solved by applying any ordinary parsing algorithm on the transformed grammar without modification. The reduction is both elegant and practical: the transformed grammar is only a small factor larger than the input, and any optimized implementation can be used directly, eliminating the need for bespoke prefix-parsing algorithms. We also present a strategy-based on algorithmic differentiation-for computing the next-token weight vector, i.e., the prefix weights of all one-token extensions, enabling efficient prediction of the next token. Together, these contributions yield a simple, general, and efficient framework for prefix parsing.
title_zh: 前缀解析就是解析
abstract_zh: 前缀解析旨在判断一个输入前缀是否可以扩展为由给定文法生成的完整字符串。在加权情形下，它还提供前缀概率，这在上下文无关语言建模、心理语言学分析以及大型语言模型中的句法约束生成中具有核心作用。我们提出了前缀文法变换这一高效方法，将前缀解析问题转化为普通的解析问题。给定一个文法，我们的方法构造出另一个文法，其生成的恰好是原文法生成串的所有前缀。随后，只需对变换后的文法应用任何现有的普通解析算法（无需修改），即可解决前缀解析问题。该归约方法既优雅又实用：变换后的文法仅比原始文法稍大一个常数因子，且可直接使用任何优化的实现，无需专门设计前缀解析算法。此外，我们还提出一种基于算法微分的策略，用于计算下一个词元的权重向量，即所有单词元扩展的前缀权重，从而实现高效的下一个词元预测。这两项贡献共同构成了一套简单、通用且高效的前缀解析框架。

title: NEST: Network Enforced Session Types (Technical Report)
authors: Jens Kanstrup Larsen, Alceste Scalas, Guy Amir, Jules Jacobs, Jana Wagemaker, Nate Foster
abstract: This paper introduces NEST (Network-Enforced Session Types), a runtime verification framework that moves application-level protocol monitoring into the network fabric. Unlike prior work that instruments or wraps application code, we synthesize packet-level monitors that enforce protocols directly in the data plane. We develop algorithms to generate network-level monitors from session types and extend them to handle packet loss and reordering. We implement NEST in P4 and evaluate it on applications including microservice and network-function models, showing that network-level monitors can enforce realistic non-trivial protocols.
title_zh: NEST：网络强制会话类型（技术报告）
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了NEST（Network-Enforced Session Types），一种将应用层协议监控移入网络基础设施的运行时验证框架。与以往通过修改或包装应用代码来实现监控的方法不同，我们设计了在数据平面直接执行协议强制的分组级监控器。我们开发了从会话类型生成网络级监控器的算法，并进一步扩展以处理分组丢失和乱序问题。我们在P4中实现了NEST，并在微服务和网络功能模型等应用上进行了评估，结果表明，网络级监控器能够有效强制执行现实世界中复杂且非平凡的协议。

title: Chiplet Interconnect Repair for Clustered Defects with Minimal Propagation Delay
authors: Po-Yao Chuang, Erik Jan Marinissen
abstract: Chips with multiple interconnected dies offer significant advantages over those consisting of only a single monolithic die, driving the rapid adoption of multi-die packages in the market. Die-to-die interconnects are typically realized as large, dense arrays of fine-pitch micro-bumps or hybrid bonds, prone to manufacturing defects like shorts and opens. To address this, typically spare interconnects are included to “repair” defective ones. Repairing is implemented by avoiding the defective interconnects and detouring the functional signals over spare interconnects. This paper proposes a repair scheme for chiplet interconnects with minimal propagation delay for those chiplets that communicate at high speed and do not tolerate too much delay on their interface. Compared to the default UCIe repair scheme, our proposed solution also demonstrates an improved repair rate in case of clustered defects.
title_zh: 具有最小传播延迟的簇状缺陷芯片互连修复
abstract_zh: 采用多个互连芯片的芯片相较于仅包含单一整体式芯片的芯片具有显著优势，推动了多芯片封装在市场中的快速普及。芯片与芯片之间的互连通常通过大量密集排列的细间距微凸点或混合键合实现，这类结构容易出现短路、开路等制造缺陷。为解决这一问题，通常会预留备用互连通道以“修复”有缺陷的连接。修复过程通过绕过故障互连，将功能信号引导至备用互连通道来实现。本文提出了一种针对高速通信芯片小片（chiplet）互连的修复方案，旨在最小化信号传播延迟，特别适用于对接口延迟敏感的高速芯片小片。与默认的UCIe修复方案相比，本方案在面对缺陷集中分布的情况时，还表现出更高的修复成功率。

title: Accelerating Privacy Implementations with GenAI at Meta
authors: Rituraj Kirti, Daniel Bloomfield Ramagem
abstract: At Meta, purpose limitation requirements specify how certain types of data can or cannot be processed. While the concept is simple, its practical implementation at scale presents opportunities for optimization. This paper presents how we leverage generative AI to accelerate deployment of purpose limitation technology. We describe the architecture of key privacy workflows spanning asset annotation, data flow analysis, regression prevention, and verification. Our GenAI-powered solutions automate complex privacy tasks, enhance consistency across reviews, and enable efficient enforcement of purpose limitations across Meta’s diverse products and services. We present key takeaways and best practices learned from deploying these GenAI solutions at scale, including strategies for ground truth validation, performance optimizations via pre-computed caches, and integration with developer experiences.
title_zh: 利用生成式人工智能加速Meta的隐私实施
abstract_zh: 在Meta，目的限制要求规定了某些类型数据可以或不可以如何处理。虽然这一概念看似简单，但在大规模实践中其落地却蕴含着优化的机遇。本文介绍了我们如何利用生成式人工智能（GenAI）加速目的限制技术的部署。文章详细阐述了涵盖资产标注、数据流分析、回归预防和验证等关键隐私工作流程的架构设计。我们的GenAI驱动解决方案能够自动化复杂的隐私任务，提升审查过程的一致性，并实现对Meta多样化产品与服务中目的限制的有效执行。本文还总结了在大规模部署这些GenAI解决方案过程中获得的关键经验与最佳实践，包括真实数据验证策略、通过预计算缓存实现性能优化，以及与开发者体验的集成方法。

title: Design and Implementation of 32-bit Pipelined RISC Processor with VLSI optimized ALU and AI Acceleration : Efficient Pipeline Architecture with High Performance ALU Optimization
authors: Nithin V Y, Pramod Raj T, Shraddha Kalmath, Srushti R, Hariprasad T L
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Designing and implementing high-performance processors requires a trade-off between speed, area, and energy efficiency, increasingly relevant in modern computing environments where artificial intelligence (AI) workloads comprise a growing share of the total workloads. This paper presents the architecture and implementation of a 32-bit pipelined RISC processor with a VLSI-optimized Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU), coupled with the processor’s specific AI acceleration. The processor uses a five-stage instruction pipeline—fetch, decode, execute, memory access, and write-back—to boost instruction throughput while reducing structural and data hazards. The ALU has been optimized at the transistor and gate levels to use low power while minimizing critical path delay for energy-efficient silicon real estate. Furthermore, an AI acceleration unit has been added to perform computationally heavy tasks, like machine learning inference, based on combining specialized multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations with parallel datapath structure. The processor was implemented in Verilog HDL, verified in ModelSim simulation, and shows statistically significant improvement in execution performance over a baseline RISC implementation, while minimizing hardware complexity. We further synthesised the design onto FPGA and explored area, timing, and power trade-offs to confirm viability for System-on-Chip (SoC) for embedded platforms. This work enhances capabilities in the development of energy-efficiend SoCs.
title_zh: 32位流水线RISC处理器的设计与实现：VLSI优化的ALU与AI加速——高效流水线架构与高性能ALU优化
abstract_zh: 设计和实现高性能处理器需要在速度、面积和能效之间进行权衡，这一问题在现代计算环境中日益重要，尤其是在人工智能（AI）工作负载占总工作负载比重不断上升的背景下。本文提出了一种32位流水线RISC处理器的架构与实现方案，其核心为经过VLSI优化的算术逻辑单元（ALU），并集成了针对特定AI任务的加速功能。该处理器采用五级指令流水线——取指、译码、执行、访存和写回——以提升指令吞吐量，同时有效降低结构冒险和数据冒险。ALU在晶体管和门级层面进行了优化，在保证低功耗的同时最大限度地缩短关键路径延迟，从而实现更高效的硅片资源利用。此外，系统还集成了一项AI加速单元，通过结合专用的乘加（MAC）运算与并行数据通路结构，高效处理诸如机器学习推理等计算密集型任务。处理器使用Verilog HDL完成设计，并在ModelSim仿真环境中完成验证，结果表明其执行性能相比基准RISC实现有统计学意义上的显著提升，同时保持了较低的硬件复杂度。我们进一步将设计综合到FPGA上，深入分析了面积、时序和功耗之间的权衡关系，验证了其在嵌入式平台SoC应用中的可行性。本研究为开发高能效SoC提供了有力支持，推动了面向未来智能系统的低功耗处理器技术发展。

title: Bridging Hardware and Semantics: An LLM-Enhanced Ontology Framework for Explainable Anomaly Detection in IoMT Systems
authors: Thrity Golzari, Zhangying He, Hossein Sayadi
abstract: This paper presents an LLM-enhanced ontology framework for cybersecurity in Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) environments, integrating hardware performance counter (HPC) features, device metadata, and known vulnerabilities to enable reasoning-driven, explainable anomaly detection. The study introduces a hybrid human-LLM ontology development workflow that accelerates ontology construction and refinement while preserving conceptual rigor and semantic consistency. It further investigates how large language models (LLMs) can augment ontology engineering through a comparative evaluation of three state-of-the-art models: ChatGPT-o3, ChatGPT-4o, and Gemini 2.5 Pro, assessed across structural and semantic dimensions. Using the proposed LLM-enhanced ontology, we achieve 84.29% anomaly (e.g., malware) classification accuracy from HPC data while mapping detected anomalies to relevant vulnerabilities and device properties. Experimental results demonstrate that LLMs significantly improve ontology quality and reasoning coherence, with Gemini 2.5 Pro achieving the best balance between expansion and consistency.
title_zh: 连接硬件与语义：一种基于大语言模型增强的本体框架，用于可解释的物联网医疗系统异常检测
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）增强的本体框架，用于物联网医疗（IoMT）环境中的网络安全防护。该框架整合了硬件性能计数器（HPC）特征、设备元数据以及已知漏洞信息，实现基于推理的可解释性异常检测。研究设计了一种混合式人机协同的本体构建与优化工作流，在加速本体开发与迭代的同时，保持了概念严谨性与语义一致性。此外，本文通过对比评估三种前沿大语言模型——ChatGPT-o3、ChatGPT-4o 和 Gemini 2.5 Pro——在结构与语义维度上的表现，深入探究了大语言模型在本体工程中的增强作用。基于所提出的 LLM 增强型本体，我们从 HPC 数据中实现了 84.29% 的异常（如恶意软件）分类准确率，并能将检测到的异常映射至相关漏洞及设备属性。实验结果表明，大语言模型显著提升了本体质量与推理连贯性，其中 Gemini 2.5 Pro 在扩展能力与语义一致性之间取得了最佳平衡。

title: Research on Dynamic Execution Optimization of Smart Contracts Based on GRPO Algorithm
authors: Ruixue Xu, Sijia Lian, Suhua Liu, Yuanjie Zhu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Blockchain Technology and Foundation Models (BTFM)
abstract: Aiming at the core pain points such as low execution efficiency, high resource consumption, and insufficient dynamic adaptability caused by the "deploy-and-freeze" characteristic of traditional blockchain smart contracts, this paper proposes a dynamic execution optimization scheme for smart contracts based on the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm [1]. Specifically, the "group sampling + relative advantage" mechanism, which is the core of the GRPO algorithm, is implemented through two key modules: for the group sampling module, the algorithm first divides the smart contract execution state space into multiple sub-scenarios based on key feature dimensions such as transaction type, data volume, and network congestion degree, then randomly selects 3–5 candidate execution actions from each sub-scenario and forms a candidate action group by fusing actions from different sub-scenarios; for the relative advantage calculation module, instead of adopting the absolute advantage evaluation method of the traditional Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm [2], it introduces a relative advantage function that takes the average execution effect of the candidate action group as the reference benchmark, quantifies the advantage of each candidate action relative to other actions in the group through indicators such as Gas cost saving rate, execution delay reduction rate, and task completion rate, and weights the relative advantage values to determine the optimal execution action. With the GRPO reinforcement learning algorithm as the core driving force, the scheme constructs a three-layer collaborative architecture consisting of an off-chain Artificial Intelligence (AI) decision-making layer, an oracle data layer, and an on-chain contract execution layer. Through real-time state perception, group sampling action generation, and scenario-based reward function design, it realizes the dynamic adaptive adjustment of smart contract execution strategies. Experimental results show that in typical application scenarios such as Decentralized Finance (DeFi) lending and supply chain finance, compared with traditional static contracts and optimization schemes based on the mainstream PPO algorithm, this scheme can reduce the average Gas fee by 22%~25%, lower the non-performing loan rate from 3.2% to 1.1%, and control the execution response delay within 500ms, significantly improving the execution efficiency, resource utilization, and dynamic adaptation capability of smart contracts. This research provides a new technical path for solving the problem of dynamic execution of smart contracts and has important theoretical and practical significance for promoting the efficient and trusted operation of the Web3 ecosystem.
title_zh: 基于GRPO算法的智能合约动态执行优化研究
abstract_zh:
针对传统区块链智能合约因“部署即冻结”特性所导致的执行效率低、资源消耗高、动态适应性不足等核心痛点，本文提出一种基于群体相对策略优化（Group Relative Policy Optimization, GRPO）算法[1]的智能合约动态执行优化方案。具体而言，GRPO算法的核心机制——“群体采样+相对优势”，通过两个关键模块实现：在群体采样模块中，算法首先依据交易类型、数据量、网络拥堵程度等关键特征维度，将智能合约的执行状态空间划分为多个子场景；随后，从每个子场景中随机选取3–5个候选执行动作，并融合来自不同子场景的动作形成候选动作组；在相对优势计算模块中，不同于传统近端策略优化（Proximal Policy Optimization, PPO）算法[2]采用的绝对优势评估方式，本方案引入一种相对优势函数，以候选动作组的平均执行效果作为基准参考，通过Gas费用节省率、执行延迟降低率、任务完成率等指标，量化每个候选动作相对于组内其他动作的优势，并对相对优势值加权，从而确定最优执行动作。

以GRPO强化学习算法为核心驱动力，该方案构建了一个由链下人工智能（AI）决策层、预言机数据层与链上合约执行层组成的三层协同架构。通过实时状态感知、群体采样动作生成以及基于场景的奖励函数设计，实现了智能合约执行策略的动态自适应调整。实验结果表明，在去中心化金融（DeFi）借贷、供应链金融等典型应用场景中，相较于传统的静态合约及基于主流PPO算法的优化方案，本方案可使平均Gas费用降低22%~25%，将不良贷款率从3.2%降至1.1%，并将执行响应延迟控制在500ms以内，显著提升了智能合约的执行效率、资源利用率与动态适应能力。本研究为解决智能合约动态执行难题提供了全新的技术路径，对推动Web3生态系统的高效、可信运行具有重要的理论价值与实践意义。

title: MetaGen Blended RAG: Unlocking Zero-Shot Precision for Specialized Domain Question-Answering
authors: Kunal Sawarkar, Shivam Raj Solanki, Abhilasha Mangal
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) struggles with domain-specific enterprise datasets, often isolated behind firewalls and rich in complex, specialized terminology unseen by LLMs during pre-training. Semantic variability across domains like medicine, networking, or law hampers RAG’s context precision, while fine-tuning solutions are costly, slow, and lack generalization as new data emerges. Achieving zero-shot precision with retrievers without fine tuning still remains a key challenge. We introduce ‘MetaGen Blended RAG’, a novel enterprise search approach that enhances semantic retrievers through a metadata generation pipeline and hybrid query indexes using dense and sparse vectors. By leveraging key concepts, topics, and acronyms, our method creates metadata-enriched semantic indexes and boosted hybrid queries, delivering robust, scalable performance without fine-tuning. On biomedical PubMedQA dataset, MetaGen Blended RAG achieves 82% retrieval accuracy and 77% RAG accuracy, surpassing all prior zero-shot RAG benchmarks and even rivaling fine-tuned models on that dataset, while also excelling on datasets like SQuAD and NQ. This approach redefines enterprise search using new approach to building semantic retrievers with unmatched generalization across specialized domains.
title_zh: MetaGen 混合 RAG：解锁专业化领域问答的零样本精准能力
abstract_zh:
检索增强生成（RAG）在处理领域特定的企业数据集时面临挑战，这些数据通常位于防火墙后，包含大量复杂且专业的术语，而大型语言模型（LLM）在预训练阶段并未接触过此类内容。不同领域（如医学、网络或法律）之间的语义差异性严重影响了RAG的上下文精准度，而微调方案则成本高昂、速度缓慢，并且在新数据不断涌现时缺乏泛化能力。在不进行微调的情况下实现零样本精度的检索器，仍是当前亟待解决的关键难题。

我们提出“MetaGen 混合RAG”——一种创新的企业级搜索方法，通过元数据生成流程与密集向量和稀疏向量相结合的混合查询索引，显著提升语义检索器的性能。该方法利用关键概念、主题和缩略词，构建富含元数据的语义索引并生成增强型混合查询，从而在无需微调的前提下实现稳健、可扩展的性能表现。

在生物医学领域的PubMedQA数据集上，MetaGen 混合RAG实现了82%的检索准确率和77%的RAG准确率，超越了所有先前的零样本RAG基准，甚至媲美经过微调的模型在该数据集上的表现，同时在SQuAD和NQ等其他数据集上也表现出色。这一方法重新定义了企业搜索范式，通过一种全新的语义检索器构建方式，在各类专业领域中展现出前所未有的泛化能力。

title: Automatic Cell-Aware Software-Based Self-Test Generation for a RISC-V Core Local Interrupt Controller
authors: Tobias Faller, Bernd Becker
abstract: Software-Based Self-Tests (SBST) allow for at-speed testing of on-chip devices via a processor core. However, creating SBSTs requires time-consuming manual labour that is expensive and requires in-depth knowledge of the device’s architecture for targeting hard-to-test faults. Introducing cell-aware testing to this task further exacerbates the necessary effort. In contrast, automating the complex parts of SBST generation using Bounded Model Checking (BMC) allows using sophisticated, state-of-theart BMC solvers to automatically generate vast parts of the SBST. Thereby, a virtual circuit called Validity Checker Module (VCM) is used to encode constraints for the SBST. In this paper, we focus on generating a cell-aware SBST for a Core Local Interrupt Controller (CLIC) that is executed via a RISC-V processor core. We first d erive a constraint s et that creates SBST-like conditions during ATPG, which allows for transformation into instructions later on. We implement a cellaware test model via a re-entrant Mealy state machine that allows complex behaviors of the faulty cell. Experimentally, we extend the CLIC with a test interface that is controlled via a custom CSR of the processor core to reduce SBST generation time and enhance fault coverage. We conclude with the evaluation of our approach on the PULP CLIC implementation that shows cellaware SBST generation to be feasible while achieving acceptable fault coverages and practical generation runtimes.
title_zh: RISC-V核心本地中断控制器的自动单元感知型软件自测生成
abstract_zh: 基于软件的自测（SBST）可通过处理器核心实现对片上器件的高速测试。然而，生成SBST需要耗时的手动劳动，成本高昂，并且要求对设备架构有深入理解，以针对难以检测的故障进行定位。若在此任务中引入单元感知测试，将进一步增加所需的工作量。相比之下，利用有界模型检查（BMC）自动化SBST生成中的复杂部分，可借助先进的、前沿的BMC求解器，自动构建SBST的大部分内容。为此，我们使用一种称为“有效性检查模块”（Validity Checker Module, VCM）的虚拟电路来编码SBST的约束条件。本文聚焦于为通过RISC-V处理器核心执行的核本地中断控制器（CLIC）生成单元感知的SBST。我们首先推导出一组约束，这些约束在自动测试模式生成（ATPG）过程中产生类似SBST的条件，从而可后续转化为指令。我们通过一个可重入的Mealy型状态机实现单元感知的测试模型，以支持故障单元的复杂行为。实验方面，我们在CLIC中扩展了一个测试接口，该接口由处理器核心的自定义控制状态寄存器（CSR）控制，以减少SBST生成时间并提升故障覆盖率。最后，我们在PULP CLIC实现上评估了本方法，结果表明：单元感知的SBST生成是可行的，在实现可接受的故障覆盖率的同时，也具备实际的生成运行时间。

title: Source Code Metrics based bug severity prediction using PCA and RFE
authors: Sweety Ahlawat, Dhiraj Khurana
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: Predicting bug severity is a crucial aspect of software maintenance. Over recent decades, significant research has been dedicated to this area, mostly focus on bug reports description and various source code metrics. In this study, identify the most relevant metrics for predicting bug severity using ‘Principal Component Analysis (PCA)’ and ‘Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE)’. Two datasets were employed for our experiments. Employed six machine learning models and accuracy, recall, and F1-score metrics were used to evaluate the efficiency of ‘Naïve Bayes (NB), Random Forest (RF), Support Vector Machine (SVM), AdaBoost, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), and Decision Tree (DT). Random Forest (RF)’ surpasses other models in bug severity classification with the greatest F1-score (64.56%), Precision (65.72%), and Recall (63.44%) with RFE. With F1-scores of 50.05% and 51.69%, KNN and DT balance Precision and Recall quite well. Naïve Bayes (NB) and AdaBoost have low predictive power, with NB scoring 43.63% and AdaBoost 52.81%, indicating inefficiency in problem severity categorization. SVM's performance shows an exceptionally high F1-score (65.01%) despite weak Precision (32.61%) and Recall (34.03%), suggesting reporting or calculation errors. RF is the most accurate model for software issue severity prediction, balancing Precision and Recall across both feature selection methods.
title_zh: 基于主成分分析与递归特征消除的源代码度量缺陷严重性预测
abstract_zh: 预测缺陷严重程度是软件维护中的关键环节。近几十年来，大量研究致力于该领域，主要集中在缺陷报告描述以及各种源代码度量指标上。在本研究中，我们采用“主成分分析（PCA）”和“递归特征消除（RFE）”方法识别出对预测缺陷严重程度最相关的度量指标。实验使用了两个数据集，并采用了六种机器学习模型进行评估，评价指标包括准确率、召回率和F1分数。结果显示，随机森林（RF）在缺陷严重程度分类任务中表现最佳，其F1分数达到64.56%，精确率（Precision）为65.72%，召回率（Recall）为63.44%，在使用RFE进行特征选择时表现尤为突出。KNN与决策树（DT）的F1分数分别为50.05%和51.69%，在精确率与召回率之间表现出较好的平衡。朴素贝叶斯（NB）和AdaBoost的预测能力较弱，F1分数分别仅为43.63%和52.81%，表明其在缺陷严重程度分类方面效率较低。支持向量机（SVM）虽然F1分数异常高（65.01%），但其精确率（32.61%）和召回率（34.03%）均偏低，可能暗示存在报告或计算错误。总体而言，随机森林（RF）是软件问题严重程度预测中最准确的模型，在两种特征选择方法下均能较好地平衡精确率与召回率。

title: AI-based Custom Web Application Scanner and Bug Detection in Website using Docker
authors: Ezhumalai P, Sharmila V, Christopher A, Makashkumar V, Aswinkumar M
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: Web application security is now a very important issue because of the increasing number of user-driven websites and dynamic sites that are susceptible to cyber attacks. Conventional scanners are dependent on high-level testing of static payload and rule-based detection and they most of the time fail to detect emerging or complicated threats. The project introduces an AI-powered Custom Web Application Scanner as the combination of manual test payloads and a Large Language Model (LLM) and Docker-based studying of the sandbox to improve the vulnerability detection and prevention. This system uses Python Flask as the backend and Flutter as the frontend to use to interact and analyze target URLs in real time. Manual testing makes use of payload-based scripts to detect vulnerabilities which include SQL Injection, Cross-site Scripting, CSRF, and Command Line Injection, whereas the LLM can automatically analyze the responses that will be analyzed through the use of a parser in order to identify any hidden or advanced threats and recommend remediation measures. Also, an environment of Docker container is employed to test suspicious or potentially malicious files in a safe way, and it is isolated and executed without any risk. Experimental analysis indicates that the suggested hybrid model has a better detection rate, a lower number of false positive and actionable information to the developers, and it is a strong and smart approach to a secure web application evaluation.
title_zh: 基于AI的自定义Web应用扫描器及使用Docker进行网站漏洞检测
abstract_zh: Web应用安全如今已成为一个极为重要的议题，这主要是由于用户驱动型网站和动态网站数量的不断增长，使其更容易受到网络攻击。传统的扫描工具依赖于对静态载荷的高层测试以及基于规则的检测方法，往往无法有效识别新兴或复杂的威胁。本项目提出了一种基于人工智能的定制化Web应用扫描器，该系统结合了人工测试载荷、大型语言模型（LLM）以及基于Docker的沙箱环境学习机制，以提升漏洞检测与防范能力。系统后端采用Python Flask构建，前端使用Flutter开发，实现对目标URL的实时交互与分析。人工测试通过基于载荷的脚本检测各类漏洞，包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）、CSRF及命令行注入等；而大型语言模型则能自动分析响应内容，并通过解析器识别潜在的隐藏或高级威胁，同时提供相应的修复建议。此外，系统还利用Docker容器环境，在隔离且无风险的前提下，对可疑或潜在恶意文件进行安全测试。实验分析表明，所提出的混合模型具有更高的漏洞检测率、更低的误报率，并为开发者提供了更具可操作性的信息，是一种强大而智能的Web应用安全评估方法。

title: Design and Verification of AHB to I2C Protocol
authors: Krithika A, Ravikumar M, Nagesh K N, Veerappa Chikkagoudar
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Transfer of data between low-speed external devices and high-speed system buses is frequently necessary for modern System-on-Chip (SoC) platforms. The Advanced High-performance Bus (AHB) provides parallel, high-throughput data transfers suitable for processors and memory units; However, the Inter Integrated Circuit (I2C) network protocol provides a straightforward two-wire serial interface that is frequently utilized for control devices, sensors, and memories. Direct data exchange between these protocols is not possible due to their architectural differences. The implementation and validation of an AHB-to I2C networking connection using Verilog HDL are presented in this paper. The suggested design functions as an AHB slave to record parallel transactions and transform them into serial data that is compatible with I2C for peripheral communication. The simulation and implementation in the Synopsys environment were used to validate the design, which was written in Verilog HDL. The findings accurately verify that the AHB to I2C protocol interface is a good fit for SoC applications requiring communication between low-speed peripheral modules and high-speed cores
title_zh: AHB到I2C协议的设计与验证
abstract_zh: 在现代片上系统（SoC）平台中，低速外部设备与高速系统总线之间的数据传输频繁发生。高级高性能总线（AHB）提供并行、高吞吐量的数据传输，适用于处理器和存储器单元；然而，集成电路间通信（I2C）网络协议则提供一种简单易用的两线制串行接口，常用于控制设备、传感器和存储器。由于两者在架构上的差异，直接进行数据交换是不可能的。本文提出了一种基于Verilog HDL实现并验证的AHB至I2C网络连接方案。所提出的电路设计作为AHB从机，能够捕获并行事务，并将其转换为符合I2C协议的串行数据，以实现与外设的通信。通过在Synopsys环境中进行仿真与实现，对Verilog HDL编写的该设计进行了验证。结果准确表明，AHB至I2C协议接口非常适合需要低速外设模块与高速核心之间通信的SoC应用场景。

title: A Schema-Driven Prompt Engineering Approach for Data-Centric LLM Tasks
authors: Emanuele Cavalleri, Marco Mesiti
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI x Data and Knowledge Engineering (AIxDKE)
abstract: General-purpose LLMs are increasingly employed in a variety of data-centric tasks, ranging from entity and relationship extraction from plain text to schema-aware data integration and analysis. Their large number of parameters and extensive training corpora enable strong generalization across application domains. However, LLMs lack access to up-to-date knowledge and are prone to hallucinations, limiting their reliability in data management scenarios. To address these issues, prompt engineering techniques have been proposed to specify the context in which a task should be performed. In this paper, we explore the use of conceptual schemas as a foundation for schema-driven prompt engineering, providing structured and reusable contexts for grounding LLM behavior in data-centric applications. We present SchemaLink, an intelligent web-based system for the graphical design and enhancement of conceptual schemas and their exploitation for LLM-based tasks. We demonstrate the applicability of our approach to knowledge extraction from plain text and to the discovery of joinable columns in data lakes, showing how schema-driven prompting improves grounding and consistency across heterogeneous data sources.
title_zh: 面向数据驱动型大语言模型任务的模式驱动提示工程方法
abstract_zh: 通用大语言模型（LLM）正被广泛应用于各种以数据为中心的任务，从纯文本中的实体与关系抽取，到面向模式的数据集成与分析。其庞大的参数量和广泛的训练语料使其在不同应用领域中具备强大的泛化能力。然而，LLM缺乏对最新知识的访问能力，且容易产生幻觉，这限制了其在数据管理场景中的可靠性。为解决这些问题，研究者提出了提示工程（prompt engineering）技术，通过指定任务执行的上下文来增强模型表现。本文探讨了以概念模式为基础的模式驱动提示工程方法，为数据密集型应用中的LLM行为提供结构化且可复用的上下文支撑。我们提出了SchemaLink——一个智能的基于Web的系统，支持概念模式的图形化设计与增强，并将其用于驱动LLM完成各类任务。实验表明，该方法在从纯文本中提取知识以及发现数据湖中可连接的列方面具有良好的适用性，证明了模式驱动的提示能够显著提升LLM在异构数据源之间的推理准确性与一致性。

title: Vibe Coding on Trial: Operating Characteristics of Unanimous LLM Juries
authors: Muhammad Aziz Ullah, Abdul Serwadda
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now good enough at coding that developers can describe intent in plain language and let the tool produce the first code draft, a workflow increasingly built into tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Replit. What is missing is a reliable way to tell which model written queries are safe to accept without sending everything to a human. We study the application of an LLM jury to run this review step. We first benchmark 15 open models on 82 MySQL text to SQL tasks using an execution grounded protocol to get a clean baseline of which models are strong. From the six best models we build unanimous committees of sizes 1 through 6 that see the prompt, schema, and candidate SQL and accept it only when every member says it is correct. This rule matches safety first deployments where false accepts are more costly than false rejects. We measure true positive rate, false positive rate and Youden J and we also look at committees per generator. Our results show that single model judges are uneven, that small unanimous committees of strong models can cut false accepts while still passing many good queries, and that the exact committee composition matters significantly.
title_zh: Vibe Coding 试验：一致的大型语言模型陪审团的操作特性
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）如今在编程方面已足够成熟，开发者只需用自然语言描述意图，即可让工具生成代码初稿，这一工作流程正越来越多地被集成到 GitHub Copilot、Cursor 和 Replit 等开发工具中。然而，目前仍缺乏一种可靠的方法来判断哪些由模型生成的查询是安全的，可以无需人工干预直接接受。为此，我们研究了使用 LLM 评审团（LLM jury）来执行这一审查步骤的可行性。

我们首先通过一个基于执行结果验证的协议，在 82 个 MySQL 文本转 SQL 的任务上对 15 个开源模型进行了基准测试，以获得各模型真实能力的清晰基线。从表现最好的六个模型中，我们构建了规模为 1 到 6 的一致委员会（unanimous committees），这些委员会会同时看到原始提示、数据库模式和候选 SQL 查询，并仅当所有成员均判定其正确时才接受该查询。这种“全票通过”的规则符合“安全优先”的部署原则——即错误接受的代价高于错误拒绝。

我们评估了真阳性率（True Positive Rate）、假阳性率（False Positive Rate）以及 Youden J 统计量，并进一步分析了每个生成器对应的委员会表现。结果表明：单一模型作为评判者的表现参差不齐；由强模型组成的小型一致委员会能够在显著降低误接受率的同时，仍能通过大量优质查询；且委员会的具体构成对最终效果具有显著影响。

title: An Optimization-Driven Framework for Refactoring Sequence Selection to Improve Software Maintainability
authors: Ritika Maini, Navdeep Kaur, Amandeep Kaur
publish: 2026 Innovations in Machine, Engineering, and Digital Conference (IMED)
abstract: Most people concur that code smells indicate more serious issues with software system architecture. If these issues are not resolved, they accumulate throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), increasing the complexity of the code and the expense of maintenance. Code smells can be eliminated through refactoring while maintaining the external functionality of the code. Its advantages, however, rely heavily on how effectively you select and arrange the refactoring procedures. In order to improve software maintainability, this study suggests an optimisation-based approach for proactively creating refactoring sequences. The suggested system predicts refactoring sequences using machine learning, meta-heuristic, and hybrid optimisation techniques after ranking smell-prone classes using a severity-driven index. This differs from conventional approaches, which only restructure when a chance arises. Extensive experimental evaluation of several open-source object-oriented systems shows notable improvements in maintainability and a notable reduction in refactoring work. Sequence-aware refactoring outperforms ad hoc and single-technique refactoring techniques, according to the results.
title_zh: 一种以优化为导向的重构序列选择框架，用于提升软件可维护性
abstract_zh: 大多数人认为，代码异味（code smells）反映了软件系统架构中更深层次的问题。如果这些问题得不到解决，它们将在软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中不断累积，导致代码复杂性增加，维护成本上升。通过重构可以在不改变代码外部功能的前提下消除代码异味。然而，其效果在很大程度上取决于重构过程的选择与安排是否合理。为了提升软件的可维护性，本文提出了一种基于优化的主动式重构序列生成方法。该系统首先利用一种基于严重性的指数对易产生异味的类进行排序，随后采用机器学习、元启发式算法以及混合优化技术预测最优的重构序列。这与传统方法不同，后者仅在出现重构机会时才进行调整。对多个开源面向对象系统的大量实验评估表明，该方法显著提升了软件可维护性，并大幅减少了重构工作量。实验结果还显示，考虑重构顺序的策略优于随意的或单一技术的重构方法。

title: Impact of AI-Assisted Online Compilers in Programming Education
authors: Amrit Poudel, Pratikshya Shrestha
publish: 2026 International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP)
abstract: In computer programming education, the choice of code compilers significantly influences student learning outcomes. This study compares legacy offline compilers, specifically Dev C++, with modern AI-assisted online compilers via the Process Feedback (PF) platform (processfeedback.org). A Randomized Controlled Trial (RCT) was conducted with first-semester undergraduates at Gandaki University, comprising a control group using Dev C++ and an experimental group using PF for lab sessions. The experimental group achieved substantially higher practical coding assessment score ((μ = 7.79) than the control group (μ = 6.29,p < 0.001), with a large effect size (Cohen’s d = 1.00), and demonstrated significantly greater theoretical improvement (Mann–WhitneyU =382.0,p =0.026). A strong positive correlation ((r =0.68,p < 0.001) was observed between coding proficiency and theoretical gains, suggesting that improved practical skills reinforce conceptual understanding. These findings support integrating AI-assisted compilation environments to enhance learning outcomes in C programming courses.
title_zh: 人工智能辅助在线编译器在编程教育中的影响
abstract_zh: 在计算机编程教育中，代码编译器的选择显著影响学生的学习成效。本研究比较了传统的离线编译器（如Dev C++）与现代的AI辅助在线编译器（通过Process Feedback，简称PF平台，processfeedback.org提供）的效果。研究采用随机对照试验（RCT），对象为加纳基大学一年级本科生，其中对照组使用Dev C++进行实验课学习，实验组则使用PF平台。结果显示，实验组在实践编程考核中的得分显著高于对照组（实验组均值μ = 7.79，对照组μ = 6.29，p < 0.001），效应量较大（Cohen’s d = 1.00），且在理论知识掌握方面也表现出显著提升（Mann–Whitney U = 382.0，p = 0.026）。此外，编程能力与理论成绩之间存在高度正相关关系（r = 0.68，p < 0.001），表明实践技能的提升有助于深化对概念的理解。研究结果支持将AI辅助的编译环境融入C语言程序设计课程，以有效提升教学效果。

title: A Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model for Cross Language Semantic Clone Detection
authors: M Jaithoon Bibi, M.Malathi, R.Subha, M.Suganthi, Vinitha Jeevanandham, R Gayathri
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: The main challenge in cross language semantic code clone detection in software engineering exists owing to the syntax differences in various computer programming languages, resulting in difficulties in applying traditional code clone detection methods. Even though transformer models have shown promising results in code clone detection, they have a high computational overhead, thereby imposing a constraint on scalability for deployment in real world software development settings. In light of these requirements, a new approach named Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model (GCM) has been proposed for efficient semantic code clones across multiple computer programming languages. The proposed strategy models code using language independent program graphs constructed using Abstract Syntax Trees and control flow relationships to support robust semantic abstraction. A highly optimized Graph Neural Network with a small parameter set is employed to transform semantically similar code snippets from multiple computer programming languages into a common vector space using a contrastively learned objective to emphasize robust semantic abstraction with lower computational complexity. The proposed approach has demonstrated promising results on BigCloneBench, POJ 104, and the cross language CodeNet benchmarking dataset, with an overall F1 score of 96.1%, 92.3%, and 88.7%, respectively, with a significant reduction in computational latency of nearly 2x, while reducing overall parameters by 65% in the cross language semantic code clones to outperform the existing state of the art baseline GraphCodeBERT models.
title_zh: 一种轻量级图对比模型用于跨语言语义克隆检测
abstract_zh: 软件工程中跨语言语义代码克隆检测面临的主要挑战源于不同计算机编程语言之间的语法差异，这使得传统代码克隆检测方法难以直接应用。尽管Transformer模型在代码克隆检测方面已展现出良好效果，但其计算开销较高，限制了其在真实软件开发环境中大规模部署的可行性。针对上述需求，本文提出一种名为轻量级图对比模型（Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model, GCM）的新方法，以实现多编程语言间高效且准确的语义代码克隆检测。该方法通过使用抽象语法树（Abstract Syntax Trees）和控制流关系构建与语言无关的程序图，对代码进行建模，从而支持强大的语义抽象能力。同时，采用参数量极小、高度优化的图神经网络（Graph Neural Network），借助对比学习目标，将来自多种编程语言的语义相似代码片段映射到统一的向量空间，既增强了语义抽象能力，又显著降低了计算复杂度。在BigCloneBench、POJ 104以及跨语言CodeNet基准数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法分别取得了96.1%、92.3%和88.7%的综合F1分数，计算延迟降低近2倍，整体参数量减少65%，在跨语言语义代码克隆检测任务中显著优于现有最先进的GraphCodeBERT基线模型。

title: Looking into Black Box Code Language Models
authors: Muhammad Umair Haider, Umar Farooq, A. B. Siddique, Mark Marron
abstract: Language Models (LMs) have shown applications for code-related tasks, leading to numerous code LMs being proposed recently. However, most works focus solely on benchmark performance, treating LMs as black boxes. A handful of studies explore attention mechanisms in code LMs, yet feed-forward layers — which contain two-thirds of parameters — remain underexplored. In this work, we investigate feed-forward layers in two state-of-the-art code LMs, Codegen-Mono and Polycoder, across three programming languages: Java, Go, and Python. We examine concept organization, editability, and layer-wise behavior under varying input contexts. Our findings reveal that lower layers capture syntactic patterns, while higher layers encode abstract semantics. We further show that targeted concept edits within feedforward layers preserve model performance. These results provide insights toward interpretability, debugging, and controllability of code LMs.
title_zh: 深入探究黑箱代码语言模型
abstract_zh: 语言模型（LMs）在代码相关任务中展现出广泛应用，近年来涌现出大量针对代码的语言模型。然而，大多数研究仅关注基准性能，将语言模型视为“黑箱”。尽管少数研究探讨了代码语言模型中的注意力机制，但包含三分之二参数的前馈层仍鲜受关注。本文深入研究了两种先进的代码语言模型——Codegen-Mono和Polycoder——在Java、Go和Python三种编程语言下的前馈层特性，分析其概念组织方式、可编辑性以及在不同输入上下文下的分层行为。研究发现，低层主要捕捉语法模式，而高层则编码抽象语义。此外，我们还证明了对前馈层内特定概念进行定向修改，能够保持模型性能。这些结果为提升代码语言模型的可解释性、调试能力与可控性提供了重要洞见。

title: Covert Knowledge Poisoning Attacks in Retrieval-Augmented Code Generation
authors: Yu Zhang, Miao Chen, Xinlei He, Tianshuo Cong, Ke Xu, Qi Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Code Generation (RACG) systems enhance code generation by dynamically integrating examples retrieved from open knowledge bases, but their reliance on external sources exposes them to knowledge poisoning. While prior attacks inject explicit vulnerable code, such payloads are easily detected, limiting their real-world impact and failing to probe the full attack surface. To overcome this limitation, we propose Arachne, a covert knowledge poisoning attack that, for the first time, achieves fine-grained control over vulnerability types while evading detection. Arachne relies on two mechanisms: (1) Benign-Appearing Fragment Construction, where vulnerable code is decomposed into benign-appearing fragments that pre serve compilability and contextual cues, rendering them effectively undetectable by vulnerability analyzers; and (2) Retrieval Driven Knowledge Completion, in which retrieved fragments activate the large language model's (LLM) contextual reasoning to autonomously generate complete vulnerable code. We evaluate Arachne on eight mainstream LLMs and four retrievers across four common vulnerability types. On GPT-4, Qwen2.5, Gemini 3-flash, Claude-4-sonnet and DeepSeekCoder, Arachne achieves attack success rates exceeding 70% in most settings for each vulnerability type across CWE-78, CWE-295, CWE-367, and CWE-614, peaking at 100% for CWE-367. Arachne demonstrates up to a 37% improvement in attack success rate over existing poisoning attacks. In two real-world applications, the attack achieves 87% success rate with 70% benign utility, indicating that the generated code often satisfies user requirements while introducing vulnerable code. Critically, our poisoned samples, which are designed without explicit malicious patterns, fully bypass rule-based analyzers and challenge state-of-the-art LLM based detectors, exemplifying their stealth among multiple failed defense paradigms. Our findings expose critical limitations in existing defense frameworks, highlighting the urgent need for novel defense mechanisms specifically designed for RACG systems.
title_zh: 检索增强型代码生成中的知识投毒攻击
abstract_zh:
检索增强型代码生成（RACG）系统通过动态整合来自开放知识库的示例来提升代码生成能力，但其对外部资源的依赖使其容易受到知识污染攻击。以往的攻击方式通常注入显式的脆弱代码，这类载荷极易被检测，限制了其在现实场景中的影响，并未能充分探索攻击面。为克服这一局限，我们提出 Arachne——一种隐蔽的知识污染攻击方法，首次实现了对漏洞类型的细粒度控制，同时有效规避检测。Arachne 依赖于两项核心机制：（1）**良性外观片段构建**：将脆弱代码分解为看似无害的代码片段，这些片段保持可编译性与上下文语义一致性，从而使得漏洞分析工具难以察觉；（2）**检索驱动的知识补全**：通过检索到的片段触发大语言模型（LLM）的上下文推理能力，自主生成完整的恶意代码。

我们在八种主流大语言模型和四种检索器上评估了 Arachne，覆盖四种常见的漏洞类型。在 GPT-4、Qwen2.5、Gemini 3-flash、Claude-4-sonnet 和 DeepSeekCoder 上，Arachne 在 CWE-78、CWE-295、CWE-367 和 CWE-614 四类漏洞中，多数场景下的攻击成功率均超过 70%，其中 CWE-367 的成功率最高达到 100%。相比现有污染攻击方法，Arachne 的攻击成功率最高提升达 37%。在两个真实应用场景中，该攻击实现了 87% 的成功率，同时保持 70% 的良性功能可用性，表明生成的代码在满足用户需求的同时，成功植入了漏洞。

关键的是，我们构造的污染样本未包含任何明显的恶意模式，完全绕过了基于规则的分析工具，并对当前最先进的基于 LLM 的检测器构成挑战，充分体现了其在多种防御体系下的隐蔽性。我们的研究揭示了现有防御框架存在的严重缺陷，凸显了针对 RACG 系统设计新型防御机制的紧迫性。

title: A Parallel Hardware Architecture for the Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT)
authors: Rajesh Kumar Mahato, Madhav Prasad Pandey, Sushant Adhikari
publish: 2026 International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP)
abstract: The Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT) is a non-interpolated and non-decimated DFT algorithm for integer multiples of a power of two signal lengths. This paper presents a customized and parallel hardware architecture for the TFFT algorithm and compares the computational complexity of the proposed design with direct DFT and radix-2 FFT algorithms. The design have been implemented on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) using Verilog and follows the IEEE-754 single-precision floating-point standard. DSP58 primitives have been utilized to perform the required arithmetic operations, and the design is verified through simulation using the Vivado software environment. This paper also evaluates resource utilization and latency for different signal lengths, verifying that while the arithmetic operation requirements are lower than those of the direct DFT, the proposed approach achieves better memory optimization than the radix-2 FFT due to its support for a wider range of valid signal lengths.
title_zh: 无旋转快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）的并行硬件架构
abstract_zh: Twiddless快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）是一种针对2的整数次幂倍数信号长度的非插值、非降采样DFT算法。本文提出了一种针对TFFT算法的定制化并行硬件架构，并将该设计的计算复杂度与直接DFT及基-2 FFT算法进行了比较。该设计使用Verilog语言在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上实现，遵循IEEE-754单精度浮点数标准。设计中采用了DSP58原语来执行所需的算术运算，并通过Vivado软件环境的仿真对设计进行了验证。本文还评估了不同信号长度下的资源利用率和延迟性能，结果表明，尽管其算术运算需求低于直接DFT，但由于支持更广泛的合法信号长度范围，所提出的方案在内存优化方面优于基-2 FFT。

title: Vulnerability Discovery Modeling in multi-version software using Weibull- Logistic distribution
authors: Anchal Dhillon, Vijay Kumar, Yoshinobu Tamura, Sunil K. Khatri
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: Unresolved security weaknesses raised serious concerns since they have the potential to allow serious breaches and threaten software system. A vulnerability is a loophole or flaw in a security system that an attacker could take advantage of and cause harm or loss. Since significant portions of code are carried over into subsequent releases, the vulnerabilities may remain and resurface in later versions. These vulnerabilities are often introduced during development as a result of ongoing upgrades and the addition of new features. It is crucial to identify not only when vulnerabilities are introduced but how they are discovered over time because they remain across software generations. A systematic framework for investigating vulnerability discovery trends and forecasting the accumulation of defects has been made available by Vulnerability Discovery Modeling (VDM). However, a large amount of the work that has been done is limited to single-release software, ignoring the impact of shared code and inherited vulnerabilities. In this work, we prefer a multi-version VDM derived from generalized Weibull–logistic distribution. The proposed work intends to examine the impact of vulnerabilities in previous releases and their recurrence in upgraded systems via code inheritance. The model assesses the potential for unfixed vulnerabilities from previous iterations to reappear during new code testing and impact the current release. Real datasets from three distinct Windows Server releases are used to test and validate the model. The prediction performance shows that the newly proposed generalized Weibull-Logistic VDM performs better than existing multi-release VDM. The proposed model offers a more practical framework for evaluating persistent security threats in extensive software ecosystems by incorporating vulnerability inheritance into the discovery process.
title_zh: 基于威布尔-逻辑分布的多版本软件漏洞发现建模
abstract_zh: 未解决的安全漏洞引发了严重担忧，因为它们有可能导致重大安全事件，威胁软件系统的完整性。漏洞是安全系统中的缺陷或漏洞，攻击者可利用这些漏洞造成损害或损失。由于大量代码在后续版本中被继承和复用，这些漏洞可能长期存在并在后续版本中再次出现。这些漏洞通常在开发过程中因持续升级和新增功能而引入。因此，不仅需要识别漏洞的引入时间，还必须了解其随时间演变的发现规律，因为它们会跨越多个软件版本持续存在。为此，漏洞发现建模（Vulnerability Discovery Modeling, VDM）提出了一种系统性框架，用于研究漏洞发现趋势并预测缺陷的累积情况。然而，现有大量研究仅局限于单版本软件，忽略了共享代码和继承性漏洞的影响。本文提出一种基于广义威布尔-逻辑斯蒂分布的多版本VDM模型，旨在通过代码继承机制，分析前期版本中的漏洞对升级系统的影响及其重复出现的可能性。该模型评估了前一迭代中未修复的漏洞在新代码测试阶段重新出现的可能性，并对其当前版本产生的影响进行量化。我们使用来自三个不同Windows Server版本的真实数据集对模型进行了测试与验证。结果表明，所提出的广义威布尔-逻辑斯蒂VDM模型在预测性能上优于现有的多版本VDM模型。该模型通过将漏洞继承纳入发现过程，为评估大规模软件生态系统中持续存在的安全威胁提供了更为实用的分析框架。

title: Automated Vulnerability Scanning and Bug Detection for Secure Web Applications
authors: Atharva Kekare, Vedaant Chaudhari, Vidhya R.
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: Automated vulnerability identification is essential for protecting digital systems since web applications are increasingly vulnerable to cybersecurity threats. This paper introduces a web security assessment method that uses automated URL-based scanning to find vulnerabilities that match the OWASP Top 10. In addition to identifying software flaws that could compromise dependability, the method combines rule-based detection with structured logging to identify important threats including SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), resource-intensive Dynamic Application Security Testing platforms, is especially well-suited for early-stage security assessments and instructional use because it is built for quick analysis with minimal computational overhead. Live bug detection words on HTTP traffic to encourage responsible testing, and non-intrusive scanning techniques are used to evaluate HTTPS destinations. To preserve report integrity, scan findings are kept as safe, timestamped documents. This study enhances web application resilience against changing cyberthreats and fortifies automated auditing procedures.
title_zh: 面向安全Web应用的自动化漏洞扫描与漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 自动化漏洞识别对于保护数字系统至关重要，因为网络应用正日益面临网络安全威胁。本文提出了一种基于自动URL扫描的Web安全评估方法，用于发现符合OWASP十大安全风险的漏洞。该方法不仅能够识别可能影响系统可靠性的软件缺陷，还结合了基于规则的检测与结构化日志记录，有效识别包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）在内的关键安全威胁。此外，该方法采用非侵入式扫描技术，对HTTPS目标进行评估，并通过实时分析HTTP流量中的漏洞线索，鼓励负责任的安全测试。由于其设计注重快速分析且计算开销极小，该方法特别适用于早期阶段的安全评估及教学用途。为确保报告的完整性，所有扫描结果均以安全、带时间戳的文档形式保存。本研究显著提升了Web应用应对不断演变的网络威胁的能力，并强化了自动化审计流程。

title: Bridging Classic and Modern AI for Analyzing Disagreement Between Lexical and Neural Code Retrieval
authors: Vishwa Bhatt, Jerry Cervantes-Fernandez, Zhixin Yu, Bryan Vera, Yunfei Hou, Jennifer Kim Jin
abstract: Aligning natural-language documentation with source code remains a core challenge in semantic code search, particularly when documentation varies in abstraction and lexical grounding. This work evaluates lexical, neural, and hybrid retrieval approaches under a global code search setting using the Java subset of the CodeSearchNet benchmark. A symbolic BM25 baseline is compared with a neural semantic encoder and two integration strategies: hybrid reranking and disagreement-aware routing. Neural retrieval consistently outperforms lexical retrieval, improving mean reciprocal rank from 0.271 to 0.318, while hybrid reranking further increases performance $(M R R=0.341)$. A disagreement-aware routing strategy achieves the best results (MRR $=0.345$), demonstrating that principled integration of symbolic and neural representations improves robustness. Analysis further shows that lexical–semantic rank disagreement systematically correlates with semantic abstraction, indicating that such disagreement reflects meaningful alignment differences rather than retrieval noise.
title_zh: 融合经典与现代人工智能以分析词汇与神经网络代码检索之间的分歧
abstract_zh: 将自然语言文档与源代码对齐仍然是语义代码搜索中的核心挑战，尤其是在文档的抽象层次和词汇基础存在差异的情况下。本文在 CodeSearchNet 基准的 Java 子集上，于全局代码搜索场景下评估了词汇、神经以及混合检索方法。研究对比了基于符号的 BM25 基线模型与神经语义编码器，以及两种集成策略：混合重排序和基于分歧感知的路由机制。实验结果表明，神经检索方法始终优于词汇检索方法，将平均倒数排名（MRR）从 0.271 提升至 0.318；而混合重排序进一步提升了性能（MRR = 0.341）。基于分歧感知的路由策略取得了最佳效果（MRR = 0.345），证明了有原则地融合符号化与神经表示能够增强系统的鲁棒性。进一步分析显示，词汇与语义排序之间的分歧程度与语义抽象程度系统相关，表明这种分歧反映的是有意义的对齐差异，而非单纯的检索噪声。

title: Software-Hardware Co-Design of a Distributed Energy Access System Based on a Unified Sensing-Computing-Communication Chip
authors: Xiaolong Lyu, Qin Ma, Jie Du
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Electrical and Electronic Engineering (AI3E)
abstract: Confronting the challenges of poor compatibility, complex communication protocols, and insufficient operational reliability in existing distributed energy resource (DER) integration systems, this paper proposes a hardware-software codesign method based on an integrated sensing-computingcommunication chip. Centered around this chip, the method establishes a modular hardware platform for multi-source energy integration. At the software level, a lightweight embedded operating system is designed, which, alongside unified driver interfaces and a multi-core task scheduling strategy, enables synergistic hardware-software optimization. Furthermore, this paper introduces a protocol adaptation mechanism and a firmware self-recovery mechanism to address communication protocol switching and system fault restoration in complex environments. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed system achieves improvements in energy efficiency utilization, task response time, and operational stability compared to conventional solutions.
title_zh: 基于统一感知-计算-通信芯片的分布式能源接入系统软硬件协同设计
abstract_zh: 针对现有分布式能源资源（DER）集成系统中存在的兼容性差、通信协议复杂以及运行可靠性不足等挑战，本文提出一种基于集成传感-计算-通信芯片的软硬件协同设计方法。以该芯片为核心，构建了面向多源能源融合的模块化硬件平台。在软件层面，设计了一种轻量级嵌入式操作系统，结合统一的驱动接口与多核任务调度策略，实现了软硬件的协同优化。此外，本文还引入协议适配机制和固件自恢复机制，有效解决了复杂环境下通信协议切换及系统故障恢复的问题。实验结果表明，与传统方案相比，所提出的系统在能源利用效率、任务响应时间及运行稳定性方面均取得了显著提升。

title: The Low-Latency UCIe-Compliant Spiral Layouts of TSV Arrays Against the Clustered Faults
authors: Bowen Tan, Xiaole Cui, Zhaohong Lin
abstract: The chiplet based integrated system contains lots of inter-die interconnections. The through silicon vias (TSVs) and micro bumps are the common components of the vertical electrical interconnections in the $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ multi-die integration circuits. They are usually laid out as arrays to regulate the routing rules. Faults may occur in the TSVs, and the redundant resources based self-repair mechanisms are introduced to improve the yield of the entire integrated chip. In the Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe) standard, each advanced package module contains 32 data lanes and 2 redundant lanes, and the shift chain based intra-module self-repair mechanism is defined. However, the faults are usually clustered in certain region of the TSV array. The intra-module self-repair mechanism of UCIe standard is not able to cope with the cases that more than 2 clustered faults occur simultaneously in one module. An effective idea to improve the repair rate is to distribute the faults into different modules by regrouping the layout of TSV array. This work reports some new spiral layouts of rectangular and hexagonal TSV arrays. The self-repair schemes based on the proposed layouts are UCIe-compliant. Simulation results present that the proposed self-repair schemes are able to repair the clustered faults in TSV array with the low repair latencies.
title_zh: 针对簇状故障的低延迟UCIe兼容螺旋布局TSV阵列
abstract_zh: 基于芯粒（chiplet）的集成系统包含大量芯片间的互连。在2.5D/3D多芯片集成电路中，硅通孔（TSVs）和微凸点（micro bumps）是垂直电气互连的常见组件，通常以阵列形式布局，以规范布线规则。TSV中可能发生故障，因此引入基于冗余资源的自修复机制，以提高整个集成芯片的良率。在通用芯粒互连协议（UCIe）标准中，每个先进封装模块包含32条数据通道和2条冗余通道，并定义了基于移位链的模块内自修复机制。然而，故障通常集中在TSV阵列的特定区域。UCIe标准的模块内自修复机制无法应对同一模块中同时出现超过2个聚集性故障的情况。一种有效的提升修复率的方法是通过重新规划TSV阵列的布局，将故障分散到不同模块中。本文提出了一些新型的矩形和六边形TSV阵列的螺旋布局方案，所提出的自修复方案符合UCIe标准。仿真结果表明，所提出的自修复方案能够有效修复TSV阵列中的聚集性故障，且具有较低的修复延迟。

title: Detecting Common Injection-Based Vulnerabilities in Web-Applications
authors: Mohd Danish, Abhinav Sushil Varshney, Vivek Jangra, Sunil Kumar Chowdhary, Nidhi Sindhwani Anand, Ramnaresh Yadav
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: The research paper showcases a general method of detecting injection based vulnerabilities in the web applications. These type of vulnerabilities allows the attackers to manipulate various parameters leading to theft of data, identity fraud as well as system compromise. The key types of injections include SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting XSS and Command Injection. The currently available tools often fail to detect all three of these or are too costly. The technique mentioned herein the paper detects all these injection flaws by comparing both the application’s response as well as the behaviour before and after sending a crafted payload. By conducting experiments on multiple vulnerable web apps it was seen that our method outperforms both open-source tools as well as rivals that of commercial ones and thus achieving broad detection coverage with very few false positives.
title_zh: 检测Web应用程序中的常见注入型漏洞
abstract_zh: 该研究论文展示了一种检测Web应用程序中注入类漏洞的通用方法。此类漏洞使攻击者能够操纵各种参数，从而导致数据窃取、身份欺诈以及系统被攻陷。主要的注入类型包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）和命令注入。目前可用的工具往往无法检测全部三种漏洞，或者成本过高。本文所提出的技术通过比较应用程序在发送精心构造的载荷前后，其响应结果及行为变化，能够有效检测所有这些注入缺陷。通过对多个存在漏洞的Web应用进行实验验证，结果表明，该方法在检测覆盖率方面优于现有的开源工具以及商业竞争对手，同时具备极低的误报率。

title: LLM-based Zero-shot Triple Extraction for Automated Ontology Generation from Software Engineering Standards
authors: Songhui Yue
abstract: Ontologies have supported knowledge representation and white-box reasoning for decades; thus, the automated ontology generation (AOG) plays a crucial role in scaling their use. Software engineering standards (SES) consist of long, unstructured text (with high noise) and paragraphs with domain-specific terms. In this setting, relation triple extraction (RTE), together with term extraction, constitutes the first stage toward AOG. This work proposes an open-source large language model (LLM)-assisted approach to RTE for SES. Instead of solely relying on prompt-engineering-based methods, this study promotes the use of LLMs as an aid in constructing ontologies and explores an effective AOG workflow that includes document segmentation, candidate term mining, LLM-based relation inference, term normalization, and cross-section alignment. Expert-annotated reference sets at three granularities are constructed and used to evaluate the ontology generated from the study. The results show that it is comparable and potentially superior to the OpenIE method of triple extraction.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的零样本三元组抽取用于从软件工程标准中自动构建本体
abstract_zh: 本体在知识表示和可解释推理方面已有数十年的应用历史，因此自动化本体生成（AOG）在推动其广泛应用方面起着至关重要的作用。软件工程标准（SES）包含大量非结构化文本（噪声高），且包含具有领域特性的段落和术语。在此背景下，关系三元组抽取（RTE）与术语抽取共同构成了迈向AOG的第一步。本文提出了一种开源大语言模型（LLM）辅助的SES关系三元组抽取方法。不同于仅依赖提示工程的方法，本研究倡导将LLM作为构建本体的辅助工具，并探索了一种高效的AOG工作流程，包括文档分段、候选术语挖掘、基于LLM的关系推断、术语规范化以及跨章节对齐。研究还构建了三个粒度级别的专家标注参考集，用于评估所生成本体的质量。实验结果表明，该方法在三元组抽取性能上与OpenIE方法相当，甚至可能更优。

title: EMBER: A Cycle-based Framework for Early-Stage Reliability Assessment in Parametric RTL Designs
authors: Alessandro Veronesi, Leticia Maria Bolzani Pöhls, Michele Favalli, Milos Krstic, Davide Bertozzi
abstract: Modern trends towards higher architectural complexity and smaller technology nodes do not align with the requirement for reliability that many application domains expose. While system robustness remains one of the most critical aspects for missioncritical application domains, the currently available tools allow designers to accurately investigate the reliability only at the late design stages, limiting the effectiveness of their intervention in addressing architectural vulnerabilities.In this context, this paper presents a novel framework for early-stage reliability assessment that enables fast evaluations to guide the RTL design process, without compromising analysis quality or relying on imprecise high-level fault injection models. In the presented analysis, the paper shows how the proposed framework leads to a significant time saving when targeting highly parametric hardware designs, achieving up to 79 x compile time reduction, and up to $37.6 x$ simulation time reduction when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
title_zh: EMBER：一种用于参数化RTL设计早期阶段可靠性评估的基于周期的框架
abstract_zh: 现代架构复杂度的提升以及技术节点的缩小，与许多应用领域对可靠性的高要求并不一致。尽管系统鲁棒性仍是许多关键任务应用领域中最核心的要素之一，但目前可用的设计工具仅能在设计后期阶段准确评估可靠性，这限制了设计者在识别和应对架构脆弱性方面干预的有效性。在此背景下，本文提出了一种面向早期阶段的可靠性评估新框架，能够在不牺牲分析质量、也不依赖粗略的高层故障注入模型的前提下，快速完成评估，从而指导RTL设计流程。文中所展示的分析表明，该框架在针对高度参数化的硬件设计时，可显著节省时间：相比其他最先进的方法，编译时间最多减少79倍，仿真时间最多减少37.6倍。

title: A UCIe Compatible Repair Scheme for the Clustered Faults in the Hexagonal Array of Interconnect Lanes
authors: Zhaohong Lin, Xiaole Cui, Juncheng Pu, Huan Yang
abstract: The chiplet-based 2.5D/3D multi-die integrated chips have numerous inter-die interconnect lanes, which may suffer from the faults in Through Silicon Vias (TSVs) or micro bumps. The faults are usually clustered in some regions. The redundant lanes are introduced for repairing, to maintain the product yield. The hexagonal array of lanes offers higher interconnect density than the rectangular array, but it requires more redundant lanes if faults are located within the same module. In the Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe) standard, each Advanced Package module contains 32 data lanes and 2 redundant lanes, which limit the repair rate for the clustered faults. This work proposes a UCIe-compatible repair scheme which increases the probability of distributing faulty lanes in different modules. It achieves a higher repair rate for the clustered faults with a low proportion of redundant lanes. Simulation results show that for 8 faults in various cluster windows, the proposed scheme achieves a repair rate above 98% while consuming less area than previous approaches.
title_zh: 一种适用于六边形互连通道阵列中簇状故障的UCIe兼容修复方案
abstract_zh: 基于芯粒（chiplet）的2.5D/3D多芯片集成器件具有大量芯片间的互连通道，这些通道可能因硅通孔（TSVs）或微凸点出现故障。此类故障通常集中在某些区域。为修复故障并维持产品良率，引入了冗余通道。与矩形阵列相比，六边形阵列的通道密度更高，但若故障位于同一模块内，则需要更多的冗余通道。在通用芯粒互连扩展（UCIe）标准中，每个高级封装模块包含32条数据通道和2条冗余通道，这限制了对聚集性故障的修复能力。本文提出一种兼容UCIe标准的修复方案，通过提高故障通道分布在不同模块的概率，从而在冗余通道比例较低的情况下实现更高的聚集性故障修复率。仿真结果表明，在不同簇状故障窗口下，当存在8个故障时，该方案的修复率超过98%，同时占用面积小于以往方法。

title: Cognitive Vulnerability Management: A Self-Learning Framework for Enterprise Cyber Resilience
authors: Durga Bramarambika Sailaja Varri
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Enterprise cybersecurity faces unprecedented challenges from sophisticated threats that evolve faster than traditional defense mechanisms can adapt. Cognitive vulnerability management represents a paradigm shift by incorporating self-learning capabilities that enable systems to autonomously identify and respond to emerging threats. This paper proposes a comprehensive framework that integrates cognitive computing principles with vulnerability management to enhance enterprise cyber resilience. The framework leverages machine learning algorithms and self-awareness mechanisms to create adaptive security systems that continuously improve their defensive capabilities. Through analysis of cognitive security components and self-learning architectures, we demonstrate how enterprises can implement autonomous threat detection and response systems. The study reveals that cognitive vulnerability management achieves superior performance compared to traditional approaches, with significant improvements in detection speed and adaptive response capabilities. Our findings provide a foundation for organizations seeking to implement next-generation security frameworks that can evolve alongside emerging cyber threats. The proposed framework addresses critical gaps in current vulnerability management practices by enabling proactive rather than reactive security postures.
title_zh: 认知脆弱性管理：企业网络韧性自学习框架
abstract_zh: 企业网络安全正面临前所未有的挑战，来自日益复杂且快速演化的威胁，其发展速度远超传统防御机制的适应能力。认知漏洞管理代表了一种范式转变，通过引入自我学习能力，使系统能够自主识别并应对新兴威胁。本文提出一个综合框架，将认知计算原理与漏洞管理相结合，以提升企业网络韧性。该框架利用机器学习算法和自我意识机制，构建可自适应的安全系统，持续提升防御能力。通过对认知安全组件及自我学习架构的分析，我们展示了企业如何实施自主威胁检测与响应系统。研究结果表明，相较于传统方法，认知漏洞管理展现出更优异的性能，显著提升了检测速度和自适应响应能力。我们的发现为寻求部署下一代安全框架、能够随新兴网络威胁同步演进的组织提供了坚实基础。所提出的框架弥补了当前漏洞管理实践中的关键短板，实现了从被动响应向主动防护的安全态势转变。
